A01.name: Shield of Achilles
A01.description:
Punch forward with your shield, dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage and Stunning enemies in a short cone. The force of the shield radiates further, dealing reduced damage.

  • The radiated force deals {FarAwayMultiplier}% Damage.
  • Non-God targets take {MinionMultiplier}% Damage.
  • Increased Stun duration when Armored, increased Scaling when forgoing your Armor.

A02.name: Radiant Glory
A02.description:
You are blessed by the Gods, gaining bonus Strength, Protections, and Crowd Control Reduction for a short duration. Damaging enemies with abilities during this time Heals you.

  • When Armored, the Gods’ blessings also grant you a Physical Shield.
  • When forgoing your Armor, hitting an enemy god with your attacks from behind reduces their Protections.

A03.name: Combat Dodge
A03.description:
Dodge in your current direction and ready your spear to strike enemies for {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage. Hitting an enemy god with the strike allows you to recast the ability once before it goes on cooldown.

  • When Armored, striking an enemy god with your spear Slows them, stacking up to 2 times.
  • When forgoing your Armor, the speed of your dodge is doubled.

A04.name: Fatal Strike
A04.description:
Prepare briefly, then Dash forward, dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage to enemies and Executing gods that are low health. Killing a god allows you to recast this ability up to five times.

  • Each kill exposes your heel, increasing your damage taken.

passive.name: Gift of the Gods
passive.description:
Choose to wear armor or forgo it. Wearing armor grants bonus Health and Protections, while forgoing it grants bonus Strength and Movement Speed.

  • Swap between armor states by using Basic Attacks while the Passive targeter is active inside the Fountain.

allDescriptions.Achilles.PSV.InGame.Short:
Choose to wear armor or forgo it. Wearing armor grants bonus Health and Protections, while forgoing it grants bonus Strength and Movement Speed.

  • Swap between armor states by using Basic Attacks while the Passive targeter is active inside the Fountain.
allDescriptions.Achilles.PSV.OutOfGame.Short:
Choose to wear armor or forgo it. Wearing armor grants bonus Health and Protections, while forgoing it grants bonus Strength and Movement Speed.

  • Swap between armor states by using Basic Attacks while the Passive targeter is active inside the Fountain.
allDescriptions.Achilles.PSV.InGame.Long: Your chosen armor state also adds effects of Radiant Glory and Combat Dodge.

A01.name: Noxious Fumes
A01.description:
Summon a cloud of noxious fumes which deals Magical Damage every second. Hitting the fumes with any of your other abilities detonates the gas, Stunning and dealing  Magical Damage to enemies in the area.
  • Reduces enemy Healing

A02.name: Flame Wave
A02.description: Summon a wave of fire, dealing Magical Damage.

A03.name: Path of Flames
A03.description:
Dash forward and leave a trail of fire behind you. Enemies that enter the area take Magical Damage every .5s for 2s. 

• You are Displacement Immune while Dashing
• Ignites Noxious Fumes

A04.name: Rain Fire
A04.description:
Summon a meteor, dealing Magical Damage. You can have up to 3 charges of this ability.

• Ignites Noxious Fumes

passive.name: Combustion
passive.description: Hitting an enemy with a Basic Attack provides 1 stack of Combustion. Hitting an enemy god provides 2. At 4 stacks Agni's next Flame Wave or Rain Fire will ignite all enemies hit, dealing  Magical Damage every 0.5s for 3s. When Agni kills an enemy god, he goes on a Hot Streak. When on a Hot Streak, Combustion is fully charged and using Flame Wave or Rain Fire does not consume Combustion.

allDescriptions.Agni.PSV.InGame.Short: Hitting an enemy with a Basic Attack provides 1 stack of Combustion. Hitting an enemy god provides 2. At 4 stacks Agni's next Flame Wave or Rain Fire will ignite all enemies hit, dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage every 0.5s for 3s. When Agni kills an enemy god, he goes on a Hot Streak. When on a Hot Streak, Combustion is fully charged and using Flame Wave or Rain Fire does not consume Combustion.
allDescriptions.Agni.PSV.OutOfGame: Hitting an enemy with a Basic Attack provides 1 stack of Combustion. Hitting an enemy god provides 2. At 4 stacks Agni's next Flame Wave or Rain Fire will ignite all enemies hit, dealing  Magical Damage every 0.5s for 3s. When Agni kills an enemy god, he goes on a Hot Streak. When on a Hot Streak, Combustion is fully charged and using Flame Wave or Rain Fire does not consume Combustion.
allDescriptions.Agni.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Short: Hitting an enemy with a Basic Attack ignites them dealing {DoTTalent1_Formula} [{DoTTalent1_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage over 3s and stacking 5 times. Flame Wave and Rain of Fire consume the ignite dealing {DamageTalent1_Formula} [{DamageTalent1_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage.
allDescriptions.Agni.Talent.1.PSV.OutOfGame: Hitting an enemy with a Basic Attack ignites them dealing  Magical Damage over 3s and stacking 5 times. Flame Wave and Rain of Fire consume the ignite dealing  Magical Damage.
allDescriptions.Agni.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Long: Critical Strikes apply 2 stacks of ignite

talentVariants.Agni.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Short: Hitting an enemy with a Basic Attack ignites them dealing {DoTTalent1_Formula} [{DoTTalent1_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage over 3s and stacking 5 times. Flame Wave and Rain of Fire consume the ignite dealing {DamageTalent1_Formula} [{DamageTalent1_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage.
talentVariants.Agni.Talent.1.PSV.OutOfGame: Hitting an enemy with a Basic Attack ignites them dealing  Magical Damage over 3s and stacking 5 times. Flame Wave and Rain of Fire consume the ignite dealing  Magical Damage.
talentVariants.Agni.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Long: Critical Strikes apply 2 stacks of ignite

A01.name: Kufic Invocation
A01.description:
Fire 5 Kufic symbols that deal Magical Damage to enemies in a cone. Charge to narrow the cone. When fully charged the symbols merge dealing Magical Damage.

  • When fully charged the symbol travels further and hits a larger area
  • Use a charge of Genie's Strength to send symbols back to Aladdin, dealing Magical Damage when small or Magical Damage when large

A02.name: Sultan's Grace
A02.description:
Dash forward dealing Magical Damage to enemies you pass through. 

  • Deals 0.25% increased damage to enemies for each % Health below 50%
 • Use a charge of Genie's Strength to summon the Genie to unleash a flurry of 5 punches that deal Magical Damage  to enemies in front of Aladdin

A03.name: Agile Run
A03.description:
Dash forward. Dashing into a wall causes you to run along it before leaping to a location, dealing Magical Damage to enemies in the landing area.

  • Use a charge of Genie's Strength to call the Genie to slam down at the landing location. Enemies take Magical Damage and are knocked straight up
  • Cooldown is reduced if you land on an enemy god

A04.name: Into The Lamp
A04.description:
Throw the Lamp forward, dealing Magical Damage and stopping on first enemy god hit. If successful, Aladdin and the enemy god are pulled into the lamp to challenge each other. 

  • They gain a Health Shield. Aladdin's non-ultimate cooldowns are reset. The target's non-ultimate cooldowns are halved 
  • The Lamp is left behind, allowing any god to enter the lamp and join the ongoing challenge.

passive.name: Three Wishes
passive.description:
Make 3 wishes at any time. Gain a charge of Genie’s Strength every 10s (-1s per enemy slain, -5s for gods).

  • Wish: Wealth. +250 Gold. +10% Gold Gains. God Kills/Assists grant +33 Gold for 3m.
  • Wish: Immortality. While dead, instantly revive. +75% Movement Speed for 10s when leaving fountain.
  • Wish: Power. Reset ability and item cooldowns. Gain a charge of Genie’s Strength.

allDescriptions.Aladdin.PSV.InGame.Short:
Make 3 wishes at any time. Gain a charge of Genie’s Strength every 10s (-1s per enemy slain, -5s for gods).

  • Wish: Wealth. +250 Gold. +10% Gold Gains. God Kills/Assists grant +33 Gold for 3m.
  • Wish: Immortality. While dead, instantly revive. Gain 75% Movement Speed for 10s when leaving fountain.
  • Wish: Power. Reset ability and item cooldowns. Gain a charge of Genie’s Strength.
allDescriptions.Aladdin.PSV.OutOfGame:
Make 3 wishes at any time. Gain a charge of Genie’s Strength every 10s (-1s per enemy slain, -5s for gods).

  • Wish: Wealth. +250 Gold. +10% Gold Gains. God Kills/Assists grant +33 Gold for 3m.
  • Wish: Immortality. While dead, instantly revive. +75% Movement Speed for 10s when leaving fountain.
  • Wish: Power. Reset ability and item cooldowns. Gain a charge of Genie’s Strength.

A01.name: Divine Presence
A01.description:
Heal yourself over 4s, and alternate between the Gold and Red buff effects. 

  • Gold buff provides a Health Shield for 6s on activation, and a persistent Movement Speed Buff 
  • Red buff provides an Attack Speed buff for 6s on activation, and a persistent Strength and Intelligence Buff

A02.name: Heavenly Reflection
A02.description:
Charge your Mirror and decrease all damage you take while charging. Reactivate the ability to fire a projectile that deals Physical Damage to enemies, increased by the mirror's charge amount. 

  • Deal and take damage to charge the Mirror 
  • Base Damage is doubled when mirror is fully charged

A03.name: Glorious Charge
A03.description:
Silence enemies in front of you for 1s, then dash forward and deal Physical Damage.  

  • Pierces through and damages minions but stops on first god hit

A04.name: Dazzling Offensive
A04.description:
Become CC Immune and then attack 3 times to deal Physical Damage to enemies in front of you each time. 

  • Attacks deal more damage and have bonus effects on each subsequent successful hit 
  • 2nd hit deals 1.2x damage and Slows by 30% for 2s
  • 3rd hit deals 1.4x damage and Stuns for 1.5s

passive.name: Illuminating Strike
passive.description: Basic Attack or damage an enemy with Dazzling Offensive 3 times to illuminate their weaknesses, causing them and other nearby enemies to take more damage from all sources.

allDescriptions.Amaterasu.PSV.OutOfGame: Basic Attack or damage an enemy with Dazzling Offensive 3 times to illuminate their weaknesses, causing them and other nearby enemies to take more damage from all sources.
allDescriptions.Amaterasu.PSV.InGame.Short: Basic Attack or damage an enemy with Dazzling Offensive 3 times to illuminate their weaknesses, causing them and other nearby enemies to take more damage from all sources.

A01.name: Plague Of Locusts
A01.description:
Locusts fly from your mouth, repeatedly dealing  Magical Damage in an area in front of you.

  • This is a Channeled ability
  • You are Displacement Immune and move at reduced Movement Speed while Channeling

A02.name: Mummify
A02.description:
Fire a bandage projectile, mummifying and Stunning the first god hit.

  • This ability deals Magical Damage, only to gods

A03.name: Grasping Hands
A03.description:
Summon allies from the underworld, dealing  Magical Damage repeatedly to enemies in an area.

   • This also Slows enemies in the area

A04.name: Death Gaze
A04.description:
Your piercing gaze burns enemies in a line.

  • This deals an initial burst of  Magical Damage
  • Then Channels to repeatedly deal  Magical Damage
  • You are CC Immune and The Scales is at maximum stacks while using this ability

passive.name: The Scales
passive.description:
Gain 2% Lifesteal and 10 Protections

Gain bonus Lifesteal and Protections scaled from missing Health.  
  • Bonus caps at +6% Lifesteal and +20 Protections at 20% Health

allDescriptions.Anubis.PSV.InGame.Long: Gain 1 Stack of this buff for each 10% Health missing.
allDescriptions.Anubis.PSV.InGame.Short:
Gain 2% Lifesteal and 10 Protections

Gain bonus Lifesteal and Protections scaled from missing Health.  
  • Bonus caps at +6% Lifesteal and +20 Protections at 20% Health
allDescriptions.Anubis.PSV.OutOfGame:
Gain 2% Lifesteal and 10 Protections

Gain bonus Lifesteal and Protections scaled from missing Health.  
  • Bonus caps at +6% Lifesteal and +20 Protections at 20% Health
allDescriptions.Anubis.PSV.InGame.Long2: At maximum stacks, bonus Protections are doubled.
allDescriptions.Anubis.PSV>InGame.Long3: At maximum stacks, bonus Lifesteal is tripled.

A01.name: Kiss
A01.description:
Fire a kiss projectile at an allied god to link a Soul Mate, giving you both increased movement speed, and reduce Kiss's cooldown. If the kiss hits an enemy god, they take Magical Damage, are Stunned and your Soul Mate becomes Jealous, increasing their damage dealt. 

  •The Soul Mate gains 50% of your Mana Regen and 11% of your Protections.

A02.name: Back Off!
A02.description:
Deal Magical Damage, Slow, and Push away enemies around you. 

  •If you have a Soul Mate, Deal Magical Damage, and Slow enemies hit. If an enemy is hit by both areas, they take reduced damage from the 2nd area.

A03.name: Love Birds
A03.description:
Fire a doves projectile that deals Magical Damage repeatedly over time to enemies hit. 

  •On fire, Aphrodite and her Soul Mate start Healing repeatedly over time and have their active cooldowns decreased per tick.

A04.name: Undying Love
A04.description:
You and your Soul Mate become Damage Immune, CC Immune, and gain the Jealousy effect for a short duration. 

  •Reactivate to Leap to your Soul Mates location. 
  •Activating this ability instantly refreshes the cooldown on Love Birds.

passive.name: Center of Attention
passive.description: Gain Physical Protection and Magical Protection for each friendly or enemy god nearby.

allDescriptions.Aphrodite.PSV.InGame.Short: Gain Physical Protection and Magical Protection for each friendly or enemy god nearby.
allDescriptions.Aphrodite.PSV.OutOfGame: Gain Physical Protection and Magical Protection for each friendly or enemy god nearby.

A01.name: So Beautiful
A01.description: Send a projectile forward that deals Physical Damage.

A02.name: Serenade
A02.description:
Sing to Mesmerize all nearby enemies and gain additional protections. 

  • Any damage done breaks the Mesmerize

A03.name: The Moves
A03.description:
Dash forward dealing Physical Damage and Knocking aside all enemies. At the end of the Dash all nearby allies gain a Speed Buff and all nearby enemies are Slowed.

  • Any enemy hit provides 1 stack of Audacity.

A04.name: Across the Sky
A04.description:
Ride your chariot across the sky, choosing when to land. When descending you deal  Physical Damage every 0.15s for 0.6s, Knocking back enemies on the last tick.

  • 2 Allies can join the Chariot ride by interacting with his takeoff location. Allies have until Apollo reaches max height to join

passive.name: Audacity
passive.description: Gain a stack of Audacity for each successful Basic Attack on any enemy and for each successful damaging ability on Enemy gods. At 10 stacks you gain 100% Attack Speed and Increased Basic Attack Projectile Speed for his next 5 Basic Attacks.

allDescriptions.Apollo.Passive.Description.InGame: Gain a stack of Audacity for each successful Basic Attack on any enemy and for each successful damaging ability on Enemy gods. At 10 stacks you gain 100% Attack Speed and Increased Basic Attack Projectile Speed for his next 5 Basic Attacks.
allDescriptions.Apollo.Passive.Description.OutOfGame: Gain a stack of Audacity for each successful Basic Attack on any enemy and for each successful damaging ability on Enemy gods. At 10 stacks you gain 100% Attack Speed and Increased Basic Attack Projectile Speed for his next 5 Basic Attacks.
allDescriptions.Apollo.Passive.Description.Talent.InGame: Gain a stack of Audacity for each successful Basic Attack on any enemy and for each successful damaging ability on Enemy gods. At 10 stacks you a free usage of So Beautiful.
allDescriptions.Apollo.Passive.Description.Talent.OutOfG: Gain a stack of Audacity for each successful Basic Attack on any enemy and for each successful damaging ability on Enemy gods. At 10 stacks you a free usage of So Beautiful.

talentVariants.Apollo.Passive.Description.Talent.InGame: Gain a stack of Audacity for each successful Basic Attack on any enemy and for each successful damaging ability on Enemy gods. At 10 stacks you a free usage of So Beautiful.
talentVariants.Apollo.Passive.Description.Talent.OutOfG: Gain a stack of Audacity for each successful Basic Attack on any enemy and for each successful damaging ability on Enemy gods. At 10 stacks you a free usage of So Beautiful.

A01.name: Shackles
A01.description:
Fire a Shackle projectile that deals Magical Damage and Slows.  

  • You can refire after hitting an enemy god  
  • Three Shackles may be out at one time
  • Gain Movement Speed for each Shackled god  
  • Shackled gods take repeating Magical Damage and are Crippled

A02.name: Call To Arms
A02.description:
You and nearby allied gods gain Magical and Physical Protections and Basic Attack Damage. Ares gains bonus Health Regen.

  • Damaging enemy gods increases the duration and the effects of this buff

A03.name: Searing Flesh
A03.description:
Flames pour from your shield, dealing  Magical Damage repeatedly to enemies in front of you.  

  • This is a Channeled ability, but you can fire Shackles  
  • Deals bonus damage based on the enemies' maximum Health  
  • You are Displacement Immune while Channeling
  • Reduces enemy Healing

A04.name: No Escape
A04.description: Attach a chain to nearby gods, then Pull the gods toward you, and finally Stun enemies around you.  • Deal  Magical Damage when Chains attach  • Deal Magical Damage to nearby enemies while Stunning • You are CC Immune and gain Damage Mitigation while using this ability

passive.name: Blessed Armaments
passive.description:
Provide  Strength and Intelligence in an Aura.

  • Build Protections to increase Strength Aura
  • Build Cooldown Rate to increase Intelligence Aura
  • Both Auras increase with Level
  • Allies gain 50% of the buff

allDescriptions.Ares.PSV.InGame.Short:
Provide  Strength and Intelligence in an Aura.

  • Build Protections to increase Strength Aura
  • Build Cooldown Rate to increase Intelligence Aura
  • Both Auras increase with Level
  • Allies gain 50% of the buff
allDescriptions.Ares.PSV.OutOfGame:
Provide  Strength and Intelligence in an Aura.

  • Build Protections to increase Strength Aura
  • Build Cooldown Rate to increase Intelligence Aura
  • Both Auras increase with Level
  • Allies gain 50% of the buff

A01.name: Transgressor's Fate
A01.description: Place a trap on the ground. Enemy gods that come in contact with it activate it, Rooting, Crippling, and repeatedly dealing Physical Damage over 3s.

A02.name: Vengeful Assault
A02.description:
Greatly increase your Movement Speed and Attack Speed.

• On activation you are cleansed of slows and become Slow Immune for 0.6s.
• While the buff is active, gain a charge each time you hit an enemy god with a basic attack.
• After reaching 4 charges they are consumed, extending the duration of the buff by 3s.

A03.name: Suppress the Insolent
A03.description: Fire a volley at a target area dealing Physical Damage and Slowing enemies.

A04.name: Calydonian Boar
A04.description:
Summon the great Calydonian Boar that charges the nearest enemy god.

• Deals Physical Damage and Stuns enemies.
• The boar is immune until it hits the first god and then continues to charge other gods for its lifetime.
• You are CC Immune for 1.5s after activating this ability.

passive.name: Still Target
passive.description: Artemis deals 15% increased Basic Attack Damage to gods and 30% to minions that are afflicted by Crowd Control.

allDescriptions.Artemis.PSV.InGame.Short: Artemis deals 15% increased Basic Attack Damage to gods and 30% to minions that are afflicted by Crowd Control.
allDescriptions.Artemis.PSV.OutOfGame: Artemis deals 15% increased Basic Attack Damage to gods and 30% to minions that are afflicted by Crowd Control.

A01.name: Energy Surge
A01.description:
Artio pulses out a strong wave of energy dealing Magical Damage to enemies. She will heal herself and allies around each enemy god hit by this ability
• This ability applies Antiheal

A02.name: Entangling Vines
A02.description: Artio creates a thicket of vines around herself that cripples enemy gods and decreases their Strength and Intelligence as long as they are in the area.

A03.name: Life Tap
A03.description:
Artio channels for 2s, draining the life from enemies in a line in front of her. 
• While channeling she deals Magical Damage up to 5 times and heals herself up to 5 times. 
• Each hit adds a stack of Slow to enemies.
• Enemies hit all 5 times are Rooted for 1s.

passive.name: Decompose
passive.description: Reduce Enemy Protections on hit.

allDescriptions.Artio.Passive.Ingame:
When Artio hits enemy gods with damaging abilities, the target will begin to decompose, decreasing physical and magical protections.
• The Protection Debuff effect stacks up to 5 times.

A01.name: Preemptive Strike
A01.description:
Charge up, then Dash forward.

  • Deals Magical Damage and Slows enemies
  • Gain Physical Protection and Magical Protection when you hit an enemy god

A02.name: Confound
A02.description:
Taunt enemies in front of you.

  • Deals  Magical Damage

A03.name: Shield Wall
A03.description:
Create a Phalanx of Soldiers that strike twice in an area.

  • Deals  Magical Damage initially
  • After a brief delay, deals additional Magical Damage
  • Applies a Slow on each hit.

A04.name: Defender Of Olympus
A04.description:
Teleport to the aid of target ally god, anywhere on the map.

  • Apply a Health Shield and Movement Speed to your ally.
  • Deal  Magical Damage to nearby enemies upon landing
  • You are CC Immune while using this ability

passive.name: Reach
passive.description: After using an ability, your next basic attack becomes a ranged projectile that deals Bonus Magical Damage.

allDescriptions.Athena.PSV.InGame.Long: Deals 1.25x damage to the first target hit, passes through and damages all enemies, and passes through walls.
allDescriptions.Athena.PSV.InGame.Long2: This basic attack can Critically Strike.
allDescriptions.Athena.PSV.InGame.Long3: This basic attack can trigger Item Effects.
allDescriptions.Athena.PSV.InGame.Short: After using an ability, your next basic attack becomes a ranged projectile that deals  [{FirstDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage.
allDescriptions.Athena.PSV.OutOfGame: After using an ability, your next basic attack becomes a ranged projectile that deals Bonus Magical Damage.

A01.name: Summon Suku
A01.description: Mount your Panther Suku, gaining movement speed but decreased strafe speed. You may Leap off of Suku to deal  Physical Damage in the target area.

A02.name: Feather Step
A02.description:
Flip over the last enemy you hit within 1.5s, Rooting, Crippling and dealing Physical Damage to them. The damage dealt is increased by 1.35x or 1.9x based on the next attack in your Basic Attack progression.

• If the next attack is your third attack, you also hit all enemies in the area around the target

A03.name: Moonlight Charge
A03.description:
Suku comes to Awilix's aid, rushing forward dealing Physical Damage to all enemies. If hit from the side or behind, enemies are also Knocked Up.

• This ability can be used while riding Suku

A04.name: Gravity Surge
A04.description:
Pull the closest enemy god to you that is either Knocked Up or Leaping. The target god takes Physical Damage and is Stunned when they land.

You are then bathed in moonlight, gaining bonus Attack Speed, Basic Attack Power, and Strength, as well as protection against Roots, Slows, and Displacement for 6s.

passive.name: Initiative
passive.description:
If you have not taken or dealt damage in the last 5s, gain 25% increased Basic Attack Power and Strength for 4s if you strike an enemy first.
 
• The buff is extended by 2s if triggered by the leap from Summon Suku

allDescriptions.Awilix.PSV.InGame.Short:
If you have not taken or dealt damage in the last 5s, gain 25% increased Basic Attack Power and Strength for 4s if you strike an enemy first.
 
• The buff is extended by 2s if triggered by the leap from Summon Suku
allDescriptions.Awilix.PSV.OutOfGame:
If you have not taken or dealt damage in the last 5s, gain 25% increased Basic Attack Power and Strength for 4s if you strike an enemy first.
 
• The buff is extended by 2s if triggered by the leap from Summon Suku

A01.name: Chug
A01.description:
Take a drink, Healing, and becoming more Drunk.

  • You also gain increased Strength and Intelligence
  • Your next basic attack deals an additional Magical Damage

A02.name: Belly Flop
A02.description:
Leap forward to and slam into the ground belly first, Knocking Up enemies.  

  • Deals Magical Damage  
  • If you are Tipsy, enemies are also Slowed after they land

A03.name: Belch Of The Gods
A03.description:
Channel a big ol’ burp to deal Magical Damage repeatedly to enemies in front of you. 

  • If you are Tipsy, the final hit will Stun
  • Reduces enemy Healing
  • You are Displacement Immune while Channeling

A04.name: Intoxicate
A04.description:
Smash your jug of wine, dealing Magical Damage and Intoxicating enemies around you.

  • If you are Smashed, gain Strength and Intelligence in anger over your lost wine

passive.name: Drunk-O-Meter
passive.description:
As you become more Drunk, gain Strength, Intelligence, and Protections.

  • You become Tipsy at 30% Drunk
  • You become Smashed at 60%, doubling the buffs

allDescriptions.Bacchus.PSV.InGame.Long2: Tipsy Buff: +{STRBuffTipsy} Strength, +{INTBuffTipsy} Intelligence, +{PhysProtBuffTipsy}% Physical Protection, +{MagProtBuffTipsy}% Magical Protection
allDescriptions.Bacchus.PSV.InGame.Long22: Smashed Buff: +{STRBuffSmashed} Strength, +{INTBuffSmashed} Intelligence, +{PhysProtBuffSmashed}% Physical Protection, +{MagProtBuffSmashed}% Magical Protection
allDescriptions.Bacchus.PSV.InGame.Long6: Drunkeness depletes over time at a rate of 2% per second.
allDescriptions.Bacchus.PSV.InGame.Short:
As you become more Drunk, gain Strength, Intelligence, and Protections.

  • You become Tipsy at 30% Drunk
  • You become Smashed at 60%, doubling the buffs
allDescriptions.Bacchus.PSV.OutOfGame:
As you become more Drunk, gain Strength, Intelligence, and Protections.

  • You become Tipsy at 30% Drunk
  • You become Smashed at 60%, doubling the buffs

A01.name: Sacred Bell
A01.description:
Lob a bell, dealing Magical Damage to enemies where it lands. Warding Gusts or Reverent Steps push the Bell, dealing Magical Damage and Slowing enemies hit. 

• Mystic Surge: +20% Lob Damage and now applies a Slow. +20% Rolling Damage and now applies a Stun. The Bell itself is 1.67x the size

A02.name: Warding Gust
A02.description:
Swipe your fan dealing Magical Damage to enemies and Knockback enemies who are close.

• -30% Damage to enemies further away
• Mystic Surge: +20% Damage and Knockback. Bells pushed are treated as Mystic Surge Bells

A03.name: Reverent Steps
A03.description:
Dance for a short burst of speed in any direction, then fire a projectile dealing Magical Damage when it ends. Hitting a god grants Attack Speed to Bari.

• Hitting a god grants 50 Spirit and reduces this ability’s Cooldown by 25%
• Mystic Surge: +20% Damage, dealt instantly in a line. Bells pushed are treated as Mystic Surge Bells. Gain an additional 50 Spirit and 10% Attack Speed on god hit.

A04.name: Spirit's Cadence
A04.description:
Conjure a spiritual dance that pulses three times. The first two pulses deal Magical Damage. The last pulse deals Magical Damage.

• You and allies in the area gain Guarding Spirits for 4s. When taking lethal damage become Immune, Silenced, and Disarmed for 1.5s
• Casting this ability immediately places you in Mystic Surge for 7s

passive.name: Mystic Surge
passive.description:
Accumulate Spirit by dealing damage to enemies. Upon reaching 100 Spirit you enter Mystic Surge for 5s and can use any of your first 3 abilities with no cooldown. Abilities used this way have a bonus effect.

• Gain bonus Strength, Intelligence, and Attack Speed while in your Mystic Surge based on the rank of Spirit's Cadance

allDescriptions.Bari.Passive.InGame:
Accumulate Spirit by dealing damage to enemies. Upon reaching 100 Spirit you enter Mystic Surge for 5s and can use any of your first 3 abilities with no cooldown. Abilities used this way have a bonus effect.

• Gain bonus Strength, Intelligence, and Attack Speed while in your Mystic Surge based on the rank of Spirit's Cadance
allDescriptions.Bari.Passive.OutOfGame:
Accumulate Spirit by dealing damage to enemies. Upon reaching 100 Spirit you enter Mystic Surge for 5s and can use any of your first 3 abilities with no cooldown. Abilities used this way have a bonus effect.

• Gain bonus Strength, Intelligence, and Attack Speed while in your Mystic Surge based on the rank of Spirit's Cadance
allDescriptions.Bari.Passive.Tooltip: Increased Strength, Intelligence, and Attack Speed

A01.name: Shield Bash
A01.description:
Dash forward with your shield to deal Physical Damage and Slow enemies in front of you.  

  • Gain 1 Block stack for each enemy god hit  
  • Change to Sword and Shield basic attacks  
  • Every third successful basic attack against a god grants a Block stack, reflecting damage

A02.name: Bludgeon
A02.description:
Spin your hammer to deal  Physical Damage to enemies around you, then slam to deal Physical Damage to enemies in a line.

  • Change to Hammer basic attacks
  • Your basic attacks now hit nearby enemies

A03.name: Scourge
A03.description:
Lash out with your Scourge to deal  Physical Damage and Disarm enemies.

  • Change to Scourge basic attacks
  • Your basic attacks Heal you

A04.name: Eagle's Rally
A04.description:
Leap forward and plant your flag to deal  Physical Damage and Stun enemies.

  • The flag empowers you and allied gods in the area, granting Strength, Intelligence, Physical Protection, and Magical Protection
  • You are CC Immune while Leaping

passive.name: Master Of War
passive.description:
When you hit or are hit by basic attacks, you gain stacks of Movement Speed.

  • If using Sword and Shield, you also get Protection stacks
  • If using Scourge, you also get Attack Speed stacks
  • If using Hammer, you also get Strength stacks

allDescriptions.Bellona.PSV.InGame.Long: Sword and Shield gains Physical Protection and Magical Protection per stack.
allDescriptions.Bellona.PSV.InGame.Long3: Scourge gains Attack Speed per stack.
allDescriptions.Bellona.PSV.InGame.Long4: All basic attacks still gain the Movement Speed per stack.
allDescriptions.Bellona.PSV.InGame.Short:
When you hit or are hit by basic attacks, you gain stacks of Movement Speed.

  • If using Sword and Shield, you also get Protection stacks
  • If using Scourge, you also get Attack Speed stacks
  • If using Hammer, you also get Strength stacks
allDescriptions.Bellona.PSV.OutOfGame:
When you hit or are hit by basic attacks, you gain stacks of Movement Speed.

  • If using Sword and Shield, you also get Protection stacks
  • If using Scourge, you also get Attack Speed stacks
  • If using Hammer, you also get Strength stacks

A01.name: Seismic Crush
A01.description:
Become enraged, increasing your Movement Speed and Attack Speed. While active, your next successful Basic Attack will Stun and deal bonus {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage.

  • Gain Haste and Immunity to Slows and Roots while this effect is active.

A02.name: Refraction Shield
A02.description:
Clash your shields, unleashing a concussive blast that deals {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage. Taking damage charges your shields, granting Protections.

  • At Max Stacks, gain access to Enhanced Refraction Shield on a separate cooldown.
  • Enhanced Refraction Shield’s concussive blast deals {EnhancedDamage_Formula} [{EnhancedDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage and Stuns enemies.
  • Restores Mana per enemy hit by Refraction Shield, or Health per enemy hit by Enhanced Refraction Shield.

A03.name: Tremors
A03.description:
Repeatedly slam the ground, Trembling and dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage to enemies every 0.5 seconds while pulling them toward you in a Vortex.

  • Refire for a stronger quake that deals {RefireDamage_Formula} [{RefireDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage and Cripples enemies, and incurs an increased cooldown.

A04.name: Tectonic Shift
A04.description:
Stomp the ground to create a fissure that deals {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage to enemies in its path. From the fissure, five pieces of earth erupt to form a wall.

  • Refire the ability to destroy all pieces at once.

passive.name: Shadow Zone
passive.description: You and nearby allies take reduced damage. Deal increased damage to enemies that damage you or your nearby allies.

allDescriptions.Cabrakan.PSV.InGame.Short: You and nearby allies take reduced damage. Deal increased damage to enemies that damage you or your nearby allies.
allDescriptions.Cabrakan.PSV.OutOfGame.Short: You and nearby allies take reduced damage. Deal increased damage to enemies that damage you or your nearby allies.
allDescriptions.Cabrakan.PSV>Long.1: The aura provides Cabrakan 1% additional Mitigations for every 100 Protections from Items he has.

A01.name: Paralyzing Spit
A01.description:
Spit venom with your snake tail that passes through enemies dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage.

•If your dog heads are alert, they also spit venom
•Each head is alerted by landing a basic attack and all are alerted after Ghastly Breath is used
•When all heads are alert the snake tail projectile Stuns targets. The stun is 75% less effective within 2.5 meters.

A02.name: Ghastly Breath
A02.description:
Your heads release a cone of noxious breath dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage repeatedly to enemies in front of you.

• Enemies hit have their Magical Protection reduced up to 3 times
• Enemies in the center of the breath are Slowed up to 3 times
• Firing this ability immediately alerts all of your heads
• Killing souls with this ability enhances its damage by 15% for the remaining duration up to 3 times. At 3 stacks the entire area immediately applies 3 stacks of the Slow

A03.name: Soul Expulsion
A03.description:
Leap forward dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage to enemies and severing their souls when you land.

•Killing a soul Heals you and reduces Soul Expulsion's cooldown by 2s

A04.name: Stygian Torment
A04.description:
Raise all enemy Gods into the air, severing their souls and dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage to them before pulling them in front of you.

• Using this ability alerts all of your heads

passive.name: Spirit of Death
passive.description:
Any time a nearby enemy god is Healed, that Heal is reduced by 25% and you receive 60% + 1% per level of the Heal.

• The amount stolen is based off of the base heal effect and does not include any increase or reduction applied
• Severing an enemy's soul increases Healing stolen from them by 20% for 5s

allDescriptions.Cerberus.PSV.InGame.Short:
Any time a nearby enemy god is Healed, that Heal is reduced by 25% and you receive 60% + 1% per level of the Heal.

• The amount stolen is based off of the base heal effect and does not include any increase or reduction applied
• Severing an enemy's soul increases Healing stolen from them by 20% for 5s
allDescriptions.Cerberus.PSV.OutOfGame.Short:
Any time a nearby enemy god is Healed, that Heal is reduced by 25% and you receive 60% + 1% per level of the Heal.

• The amount stolen is based off of the base heal effect and does not include any increase or reduction applied
• Severing an enemy's soul increases Healing stolen from them by 20% for 5s

A01.name: Shifter Of Seasons
A01.description:
Activate to toggle between Spring, Summer, Fall, or Winter basic attack bonus effects.

  • Spring: Self Healing
  • Summer: Bonus Damage
  • Fall: Protection Reduction
  • Winter: Slow

A02.name: Bramble Blast
A02.description:
Fire a bramble that explodes on hit or upon reaching max range, dealing Physical Damage in an area.

  • This Roots and Cripples a directly hit target
  • The explosion leaves a bramble area that repeatedly deals Physical Damage

A03.name: Horn Charge
A03.description:
Dash forward, passing through all types of enemies.  

  •  Deals Physical Damage to all enemies hit

A04.name: The Wild Hunt
A04.description:
Polymorph enemy gods into wild boars and start The Wild Hunt.  

  • Deals Physical Damage to all enemies in the area
  • Applies Shifter of Season effects

passive.name: Heavy Glaive
passive.description: Basic attacks deal bonus Physical Damage to enemies in melee range.

allDescriptions.Cernunnos.PSV.InGame.Short: Basic attacks deal [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] bonus Physical Damage to enemies in melee range.
allDescriptions.Cernunnos.PSV.OutOfGame: Basic attacks deal bonus Physical Damage to enemies in melee range.
allDescriptions.Cernunnos.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Short: Basic attacks deal [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Percent}] bonus Physical Damage to enemies in melee range.

talentVariants.Cernunnos.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Short: Basic attacks deal [{TalentDamage_Scaling_Percent}] bonus Physical Damage to enemies in melee range.

A01.name: Thunder Strike
A01.description:
Throw your Axe forward, dealing Physical Damage to enemies in the area where it lands.   

  • The Axe remains deployed to empower Torrent or Rain Dance  
  • Reactivate to destroy the Axe early

A02.name: Torrent
A02.description:
Swing your Axe around you, dealing Physical Damage to enemies and gaining Physical Protection and Magical Protection for each enemy hit.

  • If the Axe is deployed, first Dash to it and deal Physical Damage to enemies that you pass through

A03.name: Rain Dance
A03.description:
Create a rainstorm that Heals you over time. Gain 4 Overflow stacks over its duration.

  • Enemies caught in the rain are Slowed and have reduced Attack Speed
  • If the Axe is deployed, create a second rainstorm there

A04.name: Storm Call
A04.description:
Charge up your lightning axe, then unleash a blast dealing Physical Damage, Knocking Up, and Silencing in an area around you.

  • You are CC Immune and gain Damage Mitigation while charging

passive.name: Overflow
passive.description:
After 5 successful basic attacks, the next ability you use: 

  • Costs 0 Mana
  • Has lower Cooldown
  • Heals you

allDescriptions.Chaac.PSV.InGame.Short:
After 5 successful basic attacks, the next ability you use: 

  • Costs 0 Mana
  • Has lower Cooldown
  • Heals you for {Heal_Formula} [{Heal_Scaling_Percent}]
allDescriptions.Chaac.PSV.OutOfGame:
After 5 successful basic attacks, the next ability you use: 

  • Costs 0 Mana
  • Has lower Cooldown
  • Heals you

A01.name: Spectral Surge
A01.description: Fire a soul in a line that deals  Magical Damage and Slows all enemies, stopping on the first god hit.  If the soul hits an enemy god, it explodes, dealing  Magical Damage, and Silencing all enemies hit by the explosion, as well as causing all hit enemies to leave a trail behind them for 3 seconds.

A02.name: Damnation
A02.description:
After a short delay, a burst of water from Styx appears and deals Magical Damage to all enemies in the area.  Enemy gods hit are marked for 3 seconds.  The marked gods are revealed and have reduced Attack Speed.  Additionally, any time an allied god hits a marked god, the ally gains a Shield for 3 seconds.  Subsequent hits grant 25% of the shield value.
• Shield can only be applied once per mark per ability or basic attack.

A03.name: Swift Voyage
A03.description: Charge forward with increased Movement Speed and remain Slow and Displacement Immune while charging.  Any enemy you collide with, or that hit the wake of your boat take Magical Damage and are Rooted.

A04.name: Summon Styx
A04.description: Gain CC Immunity and summon a massive wave across the battlefield.  Enemy gods hit by the wave take  Magical Damage and are Feared. Allied gods gain Protections for 3 seconds.  Additionally, all allies standing within the zone behind the wave are granted Movement Speed.

passive.name: Ferryman of Souls
passive.description:
When any friendly lane minion or jungle monster dies, they drop a coin for you to collect that persists for 8 seconds. Coins grant you 1 gold and a Soul Stack.  You lose all soul stacks when returning to base and gain 2 max health per stack lost.  Allies can pay you 1 gold to ferry with you.  This grants you a Movement Speed boost while they ride.  
• While being ferried, allies take 50% of the damage you take as true damage.  Any Stun, Displacement, Teleport, Banish or Grab will immediately eject all allies from the boat.

allDescriptions.Charon.PSV.OutOfGame:
When any friendly lane minion or jungle monster dies, they drop a coin for you to collect that persists for 8 seconds. Coins grant you 1 gold and a Soul Stack.  You lose all soul stacks when returning to base and gain 2 max health per stack lost.  Allies can pay you 1 gold to ferry with you.  This grants you a Movement Speed boost while they ride.  
• While being ferried, allies take 50% of the damage you take as true damage.  Any Stun, Displacement, Teleport, Banish or Grab will immediately eject all allies from the boat.
allDescriptions.Charon.PSV.Ingame:
When any friendly lane minion or jungle monster dies, they drop a coin for you to collect that persists for 8 seconds. Coins grant you 1 gold and a Soul Stack.  You lose all soul stacks when returning to base and gain 2 max health per stack lost.  Allies can pay you 1 gold to ferry with you.  This grants you a Movement Speed boost while they ride.  
• While being ferried, allies take 50% of the damage you take as true damage.  Any Stun, Displacement, Teleport, Banish or Grab will immediately eject all allies from the boat.

A01.name: Training Exercise
A01.description: Deploy a constellation that grants CC Immune to allies in the area. After a 1 second delay, it explodes dealing Physical Damage to all enemies in the area.

A02.name: Masterful Shot
A02.description:
Apply Target Mark when you damage enemies with your basic attack or abilities, reducing their Physical Protections by 10%. Activating this ability fires seeking arrows toward all marked targets, dealing Physical Damage and Slows them 
• Once you have 250 Strength, you can fire a second larger arrow in a targeted area, dealing 100% of the initial damage, plus 15% bonus damage per target hit by Masterful Shot, up to 4 targets  
• Once you have 2.5 Attack Speed, Masterful Shot becomes Masterful Flurry, firing 3 arrows with lower scaling quickly at each target, increasing Chiron's attack damage and proccing basic attack item effects

A04.name: Centaurus
A04.description:
Transform into a constellation, reducing Movement Speed but gaining the ability to fire three long distance arrows that pass through walls, dealing Physical Damage to all enemies they hit.  
• If you would be killed during this ability, you do not die until you run out of time or shots  
• If you would have died but killed an enemy with this ability, you are Healed for health equal to the damage dealt instead  
• You can fire Masterful Shot during this ability

passive.name: Herbal Medicine
passive.description:
Gain a charge every 12 seconds. Using an ability consumes a charge to throw a poultice to an injured ally, applying a Heal over Time.  
• Healed allies also gain Strength and Intelligence for a duration  
• Poultices prioritize the ally with the lowest Health in range

allDescriptions.Chiron.PSV.Ingame:
Gain a charge every 12 seconds. Using an ability consumes a charge to throw a poultice to an injured ally, applying a Heal over Time.  
• Healed allies also gain Strength and Intelligence for a duration  
• Poultices prioritize the ally with the lowest Health in range
allDescriptions.Chiron.PSV.OutOfGame:
Gain a charge every 12 seconds. Using an ability consumes a charge to throw a poultice to an injured ally, applying a Heal over Time.  
• Healed allies also gain Strength and Intelligence for a duration  
• Poultices prioritize the ally with the lowest Health in range

A01.name: Heart Bomb
A01.description:
Fire an arrow of love, dealing Physical Damage to the first enemy hit and Slowing them.

• After 3s, the enemy’s heart explodes, dealing Physical Damage to all enemies within the radius
• If you have 8 stacks of Lovestruck, all enemies in the explosion area are Stunned

A02.name: Share the Love
A02.description:
Lob an explosive bomb at a location that detonates after 0.75s, dealing Physical Damage to all enemies hit.

• When the bomb explodes, 3 hearts spawn around the detonation location, Healing and restoring Mana and granting Attack Speed up to 3 stacks to any ally that picks them up
• If you have 8 stacks of Lovestruck, the hearts also provide a temporary Strength and Intelligence buff

A03.name: Flutter
A03.description: Dash forward quickly, leaving behind a trail that increases all allies’ Attack and Movement Speed.

A04.name: Fields of Love
A04.description:
Fire a volley of arrows in an area, Slowing and Crippling all enemies inside.

• The arrows grow for 2s before exploding, dealing Physical Damage and Mesmerizing all enemies inside the area, while Healing all allies
• If you have 8 stacks of Lovestruck, enemies are Stunned instead of Mesmerized

passive.name: Lovestruck
passive.description:
Hitting a Basic Attack grants a stack, or 2 stacks if the target is an enemy god.

• Heart Bomb, Share the Love, and Fields of Love always consume up to 8 stacks on use, granting them additional Damage, Healing, and bonus effects

allDescriptions.Cupid.PSV.InGame.Short:
Hitting a Basic Attack grants a stack, or 2 stacks if the target is an enemy god.

• Heart Bomb, Share the Love, and Fields of Love always consume up to 8 stacks on use, granting them additional Damage, Healing, and bonus effects
allDescriptions.Cupid.PSV.OutOfGame:
Hitting a Basic Attack grants a stack, or 2 stacks if the target is an enemy god.

• Heart Bomb, Share the Love, and Fields of Love always consume up to 8 stacks on use, granting them additional Damage, Healing, and bonus effects
allDescriptions.Cupid.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Short:
Fire an arrow of love, dealing {TalentInitialDamage_Formula} [{TalentInitialDamageScaling_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage to the first enemy hit and Slowing their Movement Speed and Attack Speed.

• After 3s, the enemy’s heart explodes, dealing {TalentExplosionDamage_Formula} [{TalentExplosionDamageScaling_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage to all enemies within the radius
• Allies in the explosion area gain Healing
• If you have 8 stacks of Lovestruck, all enemies in the explosion area are Stunned and allies gain a Health Shield
allDescriptions.Cupid.Talent.1.PSV.OutOfGame:
Fire an arrow of love, dealing Physical Damage to the first enemy hit and Slowing their Movement Speed and Attack Speed.

• After 3s, the enemy’s heart explodes, dealing Physical Damage to all enemies within the radius
• Allies in the explosion area gain Healing
• If you have 8 stacks of Lovestruck, all enemies in the explosion area are Stunned and allies gain a Health Shield

talentVariants.Cupid.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Short:
Fire an arrow of love, dealing {TalentInitialDamage_Formula} [{TalentInitialDamageScaling_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage to the first enemy hit and Slowing their Movement Speed and Attack Speed.

• After 3s, the enemy’s heart explodes, dealing {TalentExplosionDamage_Formula} [{TalentExplosionDamageScaling_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage to all enemies within the radius
• Allies in the explosion area gain Healing
• If you have 8 stacks of Lovestruck, all enemies in the explosion area are Stunned and allies gain a Health Shield
talentVariants.Cupid.Talent.1.PSV.OutOfGame:
Fire an arrow of love, dealing Physical Damage to the first enemy hit and Slowing their Movement Speed and Attack Speed.

• After 3s, the enemy’s heart explodes, dealing Physical Damage to all enemies within the radius
• Allies in the explosion area gain Healing
• If you have 8 stacks of Lovestruck, all enemies in the explosion area are Stunned and allies gain a Health Shield

A01.name: Fool's Gold
A01.description:
Roll out 3 money bags that deal Physical Damage to enemies hit and then explode dealing Physical Damage.
   • They stop on enemy gods, Trembling them and dropping a coin
   • Coins can be picked up by yourself or allied gods to provide you 10 gold

A02.name: Alluring Spirits
A02.description:
Drink some sake, Healing over time before throwing the bottle, dealing Physical Damage to enemies hit.
   • On landing, the bottle applies a stacking Slow to enemy gods
   • On reaching 3 stacks, they are Taunted towards the bottle

A03.name: Tanuki Trickery
A03.description:
Create a field where you gain Movement Speed, Slow Immunity, your Basic Attack Movement Penalty is removed, and your Dishonest Duplication chance is doubled. When you leave the area, it disappears and you transform into a leaf while decoys mimic your movement.
   • Enemies in the field are Slowed
   • As a leaf you gain increased Movement Speed, Slow Immunity and a buff that causes your next Basic Attack to deal Physical Damage

A04.name: Uproarious Rocket
A04.description: Fire a rocket that locks onto enemy gods or reactivate this ability to become the rocket! The rocket deals Physical Damage, Stuns the first enemy god hit and explodes dealing Physical Damage.

passive.name: Dishonest Duplication
passive.description: You have a chance of spawning a clone of yourself with each basic attack hitting an enemy.

allDescriptions.Danzaburou.PSV.InGame.Short: You have a 5% + 0.5% per level + 0.05% per Intelligence chance of spawning a clone of yourself with each basic attack hitting an enemy.
allDescriptions.Danzaburou.PSV.InGame.OutOfGame: You have a chance of spawning a clone of yourself with each basic attack hitting an enemy.
allDescriptions.Danzaburou.PSV.InGame.Long: Clones last 3s, deal 10% of your Basic Attack Damage and take 300% increased Damage.
allDescriptions.Danzaburou.PSV.InGame.Long2: Clones have a 5% + 0.25% Per Level chance of spawning a clone.
allDescriptions.Danzaburou.PSV.InGame.Long3: Clones target the enemy that was hit when they were created.
allDescriptions.Danzaburou.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Long: Clones last 3s, deal 12.5/13.75/15/16.25/17.5% of your Basic Attack Damage and take 300% increased Damage.

talentVariants.Danzaburou.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Long: Clones last 3s, deal 12.5/13.75/15/16.25/17.5% of your Basic Attack Damage and take 300% increased Damage.

A01.name: Unruly Magic
A01.description:
Fire out an orb of unruly magic dealing Magical Damage.

• After reaching the target location, it explodes in a small area dealing Magical Damage before breaking into bouncing minor projectiles that each deal Magical Damage

A02.name: Strife
A02.description:
Create an area that deals Magical Damage.

• Hitting one enemy causes them to be Rooted, hitting multiple causes them to attack their nearest ally for Magical Damage

A03.name: Erratic Behavior
A03.description:
Leap and create a field in an area. While within the field, you gain Stealth, Movement Speed and your ability cooldowns are decreased.

 • Dealing damage to enemy gods while within the field increases its duration

A04.name: Golden Apple of Discord
A04.description:
Throw the Golden Apple of Discord which deals Magical Damage before exploding in an area dealing Magical Damage and spreading the effects of the Apple.

 • Enemies afflicted by the Apple effect are Crippled and Trembled
 • Enemies caught in the explosion take initial damage and a burst of damage at the end of the effect, but do not explode in an area

passive.name: Contest of Gods
passive.description:
The god on your team with the highest damage dealt to enemy gods gains a buff of Strength and Intelligence.
Gaining a level or a god kill/assist provides a random temporary buff of Intelligence, Lifesteal or Healing.

allDescriptions.Discordia.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Short:
Gaining a level or a god kill/assist provides a random temporary buff of Intelligence, Lifesteal or Healing.
A portion of your Intelligence is converted to Attack Damage.
allDescriptions.Discordia.PSV.OutOfGame:
The god on your team with the highest damage dealt to enemy gods gains a buff of Strength and Intelligence.
Gaining a level or a god kill/assist provides a random temporary buff of Intelligence, Lifesteal or Healing.
allDescriptions.Discordia.PSV.InGame.Short:
The god on your team with the highest damage dealt to enemy gods gains a buff of Strength and Intelligence.
Gaining a level or a god kill/assist provides a random temporary buff of Intelligence, Lifesteal or Healing.
allDescriptions.Discordia.PSV.Compact: Gain Buffs on Levels, Kills and Assists

talentVariants.Discordia.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Short:
Gaining a level or a god kill/assist provides a random temporary buff of Intelligence, Lifesteal or Healing.
A portion of your Intelligence is converted to Attack Damage.

A01.name: Wing Gust
A01.description:
Fire 4 projectiles in a line, each dealing Magical Damage to all targets in their path. 

 • While casting, Eset gains Movement Speed, reduced backpedal and strafing penalties and gains immunity to Knockback and Root effects.
 • After casting, Eset's next basic attack will be empowered.
 • Each projectile grants a stack of Invocation the first time it hits an enemy.

A02.name: Spirit Ball
A02.description:
Sends forth a ball of spirit energy. While it travels, Eset can re-activate the ability to detonate the ball, dealing Magical Damage and Stunning enemies.
 • The further the ball travels, the higher its damage and stun duration.  Up to 1.5x the normal damage and stun duration at max distance.
 • When the ball deals damage to enemies, grants a stack of  Invocation for each enemy hit.

A03.name: Dispel Magic
A03.description:
Eset Silences and slows enemy gods at her target location. Enemy gods hit also lose a portion of their Magical Protection.
 • If Eset successfully hits an enemy god, allies near the Dispel Magic or Eset gain a Shield.
 • If Eset hits multiple enemy gods, the shield is increased by 30% for each enemy hit after the first up to a maximum of 60%.

A04.name: Circle of Protection
A04.description:
Call down your staff and create a Circle of Protective Magic for 5 seconds before it explodes, dealing Magical Damage to all enemies and healing all allies in the area.
 • Eset can re-activate this ability at any time to detonate it, dealing the damage and healing early.
 • Any damage dealt in the area while it is active charges the circle, increasing its damage and healing.
 • While standing in the area, allies take 30% less damage.

passive.name: Funeral Rites
passive.description: Deaths grant Regeneration

allDescriptions.Eset.Passive.Ingame:
Whenever a god dies within 12.8m of Eset, she gains a stack of Funeral Rites; granting HPS and MPS to her and nearby allies. Additionally, every third Basic Attack from Eset is empowered; allowing it to hit in a wider radius and dealing  Bonus Damage based on her stacks of Invocation.
 • At 5 stacks, Eset's Invocation buff can stack up to 5 stacks.
 • At 10 stacks, Eset's Invocation buff can stack up to 6 stacks, and Eset gains 10 Cooldown Rate.

A01.name: Unchained
A01.description:
Savagely Leap forward, dealing Physical Damage when you land.

  • When Empowered, Stun all enemies in the area, then remove all Runes
  •If not Empowered, gain 3 Runes

A02.name: Seething Howl
A02.description: Unleash a howl, gaining increased Strength, Attack Speed, and Lifesteal.  • Gain 2 Runes

A03.name: Brutalize
A03.description:
Gain Protections, Leap forward, and grab onto an enemy, dealing Physical Damage repeatedly to all nearby enemies.

  • You are Displacement Immune while Channeling
  • When Empowered, deal increased Physical Damage repeatedly instead, then all Runes are consumed
  • If not Empowered, gain 1 Rune per successful hit
  • Reduces enemy Healing

A04.name: Ragnarok
A04.description:
Grow massive in size, and your next basic attack deals Physical Damage and can Pick Up an enemy god and carry them to any position

  • Gain increased Movement Speed, Physical Protection, and Magical Protection and become CC Immune while massive

passive.name: Unbound Runes
passive.description:
Your Runes are activated by successful basic attacks, or by activating abilities. You activate 5 Runes on killing an enemy god.

At five Runes your next Ability becomes Empowered and gains an additional effect.

allDescriptions.Fenrir.PSV.InGame.Short:
Your Runes are activated by successful basic attacks, or by activating abilities. You activate 5 Runes on killing an enemy god.

At five Runes your next Ability becomes Empowered and gains an additional effect.
allDescriptions.Fenrir.PSV.OutOfGame:
Your Runes are activated by successful basic attacks, or by activating abilities. You activate 5 Runes on killing an enemy god.

At five Runes your next Ability becomes Empowered and gains an additional effect.

A01.name: Turn of Fate
A01.description:
Send a curse forward dealing Magical Damage to enemies it passes through. For each enemy hit, all nearby allied gods gain Bonus Damage.

• Enemy gods are marked for 5s. Any Hard Crowd Control effect consumes the mark to deal bonus Magical Damage.

A02.name: Ohm
A02.description:
Rise into the lotus postion Silencing enemies in front of you and increasing Protections of nearby allied gods.

• Ganesha gains an additional 50% of the Protections he provides
• You are Displacement Immune while channeling

A03.name: Remove Obstacles
A03.description:
Dash forward dealing Magical Damage to enemy minions you pass through and stopping on enemy gods, holding them in place before Knocking them Up.

• While Dashing you pass through ultimate player made walls and destroy non-ultimate player made walls.

A04.name: Dharmic Pillars
A04.description:
Summon 4 Great Pillars to imprison your enemies. Enemies that pass the field between each pillar take an initial hit of Magical Damage, are Slowed, and have their Protections reduced.

• Enemies continue to take Magical Damage if they stay in the field.
• Minions take 40% reduced damage from this ability

passive.name: Good Fortune
passive.description: Any time you deal a killing blow, the nearest allied god receives the credit and you receive the rewards for an assist instead plus a bonus amount of gold. In addition, your assist range and the time before you lose assist credit is increased.

allDescriptions.Ganesha.PSV.InGame.Short: Any time you deal a killing blow, the nearest allied god receives the credit and you receive the rewards for an assist instead plus a bonus amount of gold. In addition, your assist range and the time before you lose assist credit is increased.
allDescriptions.Ganesha.PSV.OutOfGame: Any time you deal a killing blow, the nearest allied god receives the credit and you receive the rewards for an assist instead plus a bonus amount of gold. In addition, your assist range and the time before you lose assist credit is increased.

A01.name: Death From Below
A01.description:
Leap through the underworld, then emerge and deal Magical Damage to enemies.

  • Blighted enemies are Slowed

A02.name: Shroud Of Darkness
A02.description:
Silence enemies in front of you.

  • Blighted enemies are also Feared and Blight is empowered for 6s.

A03.name: Devour Souls
A03.description:
Devour the souls of your enemies, dealing Magical Damage to enemies around you.

  • Blighted enemies Detonate when hit, dealing additional Magical Damage to them and enemies around them
  • Each Detonation also Heals you and nearby allies

A04.name: Pillar Of Agony
A04.description:
Channel a Vortex around you that drags foes to their death, and repeatedly deals  Magical Damage.

  • You may use one other ability while Channeling
  • Blighted enemies have their  Protections reduced
  • You are CC Immune, and gain Increased Protections while Channelling

passive.name: Blight
passive.description:
Your attacks and abilities apply Blight. 

  • Blighted enemies have reduced Strength and Intelligence
  • Your abilities have extra effects on Blighted enemies

allDescriptions.Hades.PSV.InGame.Short:
Your attacks and abilities apply Blight. 

  • Blighted enemies have reduced Strength and Intelligence
  • Your abilities have extra effects on Blighted enemies
allDescriptions.Hades.PSV.OutOfGame:
Your attacks and abilities apply Blight. 

  • Blighted enemies have reduced Strength and Intelligence
  • Your abilities have extra effects on Blighted enemies

A01.name: Triplicate Form
A01.description: Fire a projectile that deals Magical Damage to enemies. At its destination, a portal opens that deals Magical Damage and Stuns enemies in the area.

A02.name: Spell Eater
A02.description:
Create a Sigil that charges up when gods activate abilities in a large area.

  • Reactivate to call down the Sigil and Magical Damage to enemies in the targeted area
  • Damage increases up when fully charged

A03.name: Repel Magic
A03.description:
Grant yourself or an ally a Magical Shield, absorbing Magical damage.

  • Deals Magical Damage near whomever is shielded
  • Activating this increases your Movement Speed, and gives Spell Eater 3 Charges

A04.name: Open the Gates
A04.description:
Channel to fire a series of 3 beams each that deal Magical Damage to enemies in the area. Gain Intelligence for each god hit by each beam.

You are CC Immune while Channeling.

passive.name: Mythic Ritual
passive.description:
You may interact with things to empower them.

  • Interacting with an allied Structure creates a zone which regenerates health and mana
  • Interacting with an ally who has recently killed a god will increase both your and that ally’s Strength and Intelligence.

allDescriptions.Hecate.PSV.InGame.Long2: Can move while channeling. Channel will not be interrupted if the target or Hecate get out of range.
allDescriptions.Hecate.PSV.InGame.Long3: Structure buff area has infinite duration. Only 1 Structure can be buffed at a time. If a new one is buffed the previous one will lose the effect.
allDescriptions.Hecate.PSV.InGame.Long4: Must complete the ritual on a player within {PlayerWindow} seconds of that player getting a kill.
allDescriptions.Hecate.PSV.InGame.Short:
You may interact with things to empower them.

  • Interacting with an allied Structure creates a zone which regenerates health and mana
  • Interacting with an ally who has recently killed a god will increase both your and that ally’s Strength and Intelligence
allDescriptions.Hecate.PSV.OutOfGame:
You may interact with things to empower them.

  • Interacting with an allied Structure creates a zone which regenerates health and mana
  • Interacting with an ally who has recently killed a god will increase both your and that ally’s Strength and Intelligence.

A01.name: Driving Strike
A01.description: Dash forward, dealing Physical Damage, Stunning and Pushing enemies hit.

A02.name: Earthbreaker
A02.description: Create a rift that deals Physical Damage to enemies in front of you. Enemies hit by the end area are Pulled to you.

A03.name: Mitigate Wounds
A03.description: Immediately Heal yourself, and gain Attack Speed and Protections for 4s . At the end of the duration Heal yourself again for a percentage of damage taken during the effect.

A04.name: Excavate
A04.description: Hurl a boulder at a location, Displacing enemies straight up at the landing spot. The boulder then rolls and bounces off walls, dealing Physical Damage to enemies hit.

passive.name: Apotheosis
passive.description:
Hercules gains Strength when enemy gods damage him. This stacks up to 3 times and lasts 5s. Additionally,  hit a target with an ability to gain a stack toward achieving Apotheosis, or 2 stacks from his Ultimate. 

At 4 stacks, enter an empowered state that immediately subtracts 2s from active cooldowns and provides an additional Strength, Protections, and Cleaving basic attacks for the duration.

allDescriptions.Hercules.PSV.OutOfGame:
Hercules gains Strength when enemy gods damage him. This stacks up to 3 times and lasts 5s. Additionally,  hit a target with an ability to gain a stack toward achieving Apotheosis, or 2 stacks from his Ultimate. 

At 4 stacks, enter an empowered state that immediately subtracts 2s from active cooldowns and provides an additional Strength, Protections, and Cleaving basic attacks for the duration.
allDescriptions.Hercules.PSV.InGame.Short:
Hercules gains Strength when enemy gods damage him. This stacks up to 3 times and lasts 5s. Additionally,  hit a target with an ability to gain a stack toward achieving Apotheosis, or 2 stacks from his Ultimate. 

At 4 stacks, enter an empowered state that immediately subtracts 2s from active cooldowns and provides an additional Strength, Protections, and Cleaving basic attacks for the duration.
allDescriptions.Hercules.PSV.InGame.Long: Strength from Apotheosis is equal to 1 Stack of Strength from taking damage from Gods
allDescriptions.Hercules.PSV.InGame.Long2: Each activation of an ability can only grant 1 stack

A01.name: Somersault
A01.description:
Leap forward, dealing Physical Damage and Slowing enemies in the area where you land.

  • Enemies hit when taking off take damage.

A02.name: Overhand Smash
A02.description:
Channel for a short duration. At the end of the Channel, deal Physical Damage to enemies in front of you and apply a Physical Protection debuff.

  • While channeling you are Displacement Immune and Immune to strafe and backpedal movement penalties.

A03.name: Sacred Monkey
A03.description: Throw a projectile monkey that deals Physical Damage to any enemies it hits. After hitting, it will bounce to nearby enemies applying a Mark to only the most recently hit enemy. Reactivate this ability to Teleport to the Marked enemy.

A04.name: Fear No Evil
A04.description:
Create a Totem that repeatedly Fears and deals Physical Damage to all enemies around it.

  • Hits every {HitRate}s 
  • Fear can only last a maximum of 1s.

passive.name: Infused Strikes
passive.description: After using an ability, Hun Batz's next Basic Attack will deal {DmgIncrease%}x damage and grants Hun Batz a stacking Strength buff on successful hit. Stacks up to 4 times.

allDescriptions.HunBatz.PSV.InGame.Short: After using an ability, Hun Batz's next Basic Attack will deal {DmgIncrease%}x damage and grants Hun Batz a stacking Strength buff on successful hit. Stacks up to 4 times.
allDescriptions.HunBatz.PSV.OutOfGame: After using an ability, Hun Batz's next Basic Attack will deal {DmgIncrease%}x damage and grants Hun Batz a stacking Strength buff on successful hit. Stacks up to 4 times.
allDescriptions.HunBatz.PSV.InGame.Short.Talent: After using an ability, Hun Batz's next Basic Attack will Slow the target.
allDescriptions.HunBatz.PSV.OutOfGame.Talent: After using an ability, Hun Batz's next Basic Attack will deal {talentdamage%}x damage and Slowthe target.

A01.name: Imbue Arrows
A01.description:
Imbue your arrows with heavenly light for 6s, empowering your Attacks as Strike Shot, Spread Shot, or Storm Shot.

  • Strike Shot: Lob explosions that deal bonus Physical Damage in an area; may fire over walls
  • Spread Shot: Fire 5 arrows in a cone; only the center hit applies on-hit item effects to the target
  • Storm Shot: Gain Attack Speed and fire faster, longer-range shots that deal reduced Physical Damage

A02.name: Rolling Thunder
A02.description:
Call down four lightning strikes in a line, dealing Physical Damage per strike to enemies in each area. Aim the direction of the line.

  • Enemies hit by more than one strike are Mesmerized

A03.name: Jolt
A03.description:
Dash forward with your blades, dealing Physical Damage to enemies in your path.

  • Hitting an enemy god Roots them as you backflip away and loose an arrow that deals Physical Damage in an area around them and can Critically Strike and trigger on-hit item effects

A04.name: Blades of Retribution
A04.description:
Become CC Immune and summon five swords of light, firing them out in a cone. Each sword deals Physical Damage and Cripples enemies.

  • Refire within 3s to recall the swords toward you
  • Enemies hit by both the outgoing volley and the recall are Stunned
  • Each sword hit after the first on the same target deals reduced damage; the reduction resets before the recall

passive.name: Mark of Vengeance
passive.description:
When you drop below 75% Health, apply Mark of Vengeance to the enemy god that most recently damaged you for 10s.

  • Each Attack against the marked god grants stacking Attack Speed
  • Scoring a Kill or Assist on the marked god grants Movement Speed and a permanent 5 Strength, up to 25.
  • This passive has a 20s cooldown

allDescriptions.Ishtar.PSV.InGame.Short:
When you drop below 75% Health, apply Mark of Vengeance to the enemy god that most recently damaged you for 10s.

  • Each Attack against the marked god grants stacking Attack Speed for 4s; each stack refreshes duration
  • Scoring a Kill or Assist on the marked god grants Movement Speed for 5s and a permanent 5 Strength, up to 25.
  • This passive has a 20s cooldown
allDescriptions.Ishtar.PSV.OutOfGame:
When you drop below 75% Health, apply Mark of Vengeance to the enemy god that most recently damaged you for 10s.

  • Each Attack against the marked god grants stacking Attack Speed
  • Scoring a Kill or Assist on the marked god grants Movement Speed and a permanent 5 Strength, up to 25.
  • This passive has a 20s cooldown
allDescriptions.Ishtar.PSV.InGame.Long1: Stacks up to 6, capped at 30% total Attack Speed.
allDescriptions.Ishtar.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Long1: Your Attacks use the Spread Shot cone at all times; Imbue no longer offers stance selection.

talentVariants.Ishtar.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Long1: Your Attacks use the Spread Shot cone at all times; Imbue no longer offers stance selection.

A01.name: Sickle Storm
A01.description:
Significantly increases your Attack Speed for 6 seconds, while your Basic Attacks deal {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage but no longer pierce enemies or return to you.

  • Basic Attacks deal Bonus Damage to Structures.
  • Applies a stacking Bleed effect to enemies hit.

A02.name: Spectral Projection
A02.description:
Send forth a spectral projection of yourself, dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage and Slowing all Enemies in a line.
  • Reduces enemy Healing

A03.name: Fade Away
A03.description:
Descend into the underworld, becoming Stealthed, and leap away from your current position.

  • Gain Movement Speed while in Stealth.

A04.name: Dark Portal
A04.description:
Summon a dark portal which deals instant {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage and {Bleed_Formula} [{BleedScaling_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage over time.

  • Damaged enemies are also Silenced and Slowed.

passive.name: Death Draws Nigh
passive.description:
Gain Percent Penetration and Intelligence for each 1% of your Max Health taken as damage.

  • Each stack fades 10 seconds after the damage was taken.
  • Stack count cannot drop below the percentage of your current missing health.

allDescriptions.Izanami.PSV.InGame.Short:
Gain Percent Penetration and Intelligence for each 1% of your Max Health taken as damage.

  • Each stack fades 10 seconds after the damage was taken.
  • Stack count cannot drop below the percentage of your current missing health.
allDescriptions.Izanami.PSV.OutOfGame.Short:
Gain Percent Penetration and Intelligence for each 1% of your Max Health taken as damage.

  • Each stack fades 10 seconds after the damage was taken.
  • Stack count cannot drop below the percentage of your current missing health.

A01.name: Portal
A01.description:
Open a portal on a surface.

  • Wall portals create a passage to the other side
  • Ground portals Banishes you and enemies upwards, dealing Magical Damage to enemies on landing

A02.name: Unstable Vortex
A02.description:
Launch two linked portals, dealing Magical Damage to enemies in their path

  • Hitting an enemy with both portals deals bonus Magical Damage

A03.name: Threshold
A03.description:
Unleash a rift that Slows enemies and grants Movement Speed to allies who cross it.

  • Affected enemies are Phased, causing your next ability to deal bonus Magical Damage and Magical Damage you deal ignores 15% of their Magical Protection
  • Passive: You and allies gain stacking Movement Speed when crossing the rift or passing through a portal up to 3 stacks

A04.name: Through Space and Time
A04.description:
Fire a global projectile that deals up to Magical Damage and opens portals for allies on any surface it passes. Enemies hit are Phased if Threshold is ranked.

  • You are CC Immune while firing
  • Damage increases with distance traveled

passive.name: Passages
passive.description: When you pass through a Portal or Threshold, your next ability deals bonus Magical Damage. Stacks up to 2 times.

allDescriptions.Janus.Passive.InGame: When you pass through a Portal or Threshold, your next ability deals {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] bonus Magical Damage. Stacks up to 2 times.
allDescriptions.Janus.Passive.OutOfGame: When you pass through a Portal or Threshold, your next ability deals bonus Magical Damage. Stacks up to 2 times.

A01.name: Persistent Gust
A01.description:
Create a Gust of Wind that deals Physical Damage and Knocks Up enemy gods when deployed and yourself always.

  • The Gust area continually deals Physical Damage
  • Deals 60% of the Initial Damage and Knock Up to enemies who walk into it after the initial deploy.
  • You gain increased Attack Speed while in the outer area of the Gust

A02.name: Explosive Bolts
A02.description:
Your next 3 basic attacks are wider and explode on the first enemy hit.

  • You gain increased Critical Strike Chance while this ability is active
  • This ability can gain multiple charges

A03.name: Agility
A03.description:
Dash forward and gain increased Strength.

  • This ability can be used while Displaced, and you will Dash further

A04.name: Air Strike
A04.description:
Dash forward and fly into the sky, dropping explosives and dealing Physical Damage to enemies beneath you.

  • Select a landing location, or wait to Dash backwards, dealing Physical Damage to enemies again before landing

passive.name: Rapid Reincarnation
passive.description:
When exiting the fountain, fly into the sky and soar over obstacles.

 • Select a landing location early or descend when the duration expires

allDescriptions.JingWei.PSV.InGame.Short:
When exiting the fountain, fly into the sky and soar over obstacles.

 • Select a landing location early or descend when the duration expires
allDescriptions.JingWei.PSV.OutOfGame:
When exiting the fountain, fly into the sky and soar over obstacles.

 • Select a landing location early or descend when the duration expires
allDescriptions.JingWei.PSV.InGame.Long: This abilty can be canceled before ascending.
allDescriptions.JingWei.PSV.InGame.Long2: You will not ascend if firing basic attacks when leaving the fountain.
allDescriptions.JingWei.PSV.InGame.Long3: Jing Wei is fully CC Immune during buildup, ascent, flight, and descent.

A01.name: Nimble Strike
A01.description:
Leap dealing Physical Damage to enemies when landing. Heal Health if this ability landed on an enemy.

  • If you landed on an enemy god, heal for a percentage of their missing health
  • If you landed on multiple gods, restore based on the god that would heal you the most
  • Applies 2 stacks of Rupture

A02.name: Lash
A02.description:
Throw 3 blades forward, each dealing Physical Damage and applying a bleed. The bleed deals Physical Damage every .5s for 3s.

  • Applies 1 stack of Rupture for each blade hit

A03.name: Incense
A03.description:
Stun enemies with incense, gaining bonus STR and INT. Siphon targets, dealing Physical Damage and healing {Heal} Health per hit. Damage and Heal increased per Rupture stack, consuming them.

  • All heals after the first are reduced by 80%. The strongest heal is resolved first
  • Non-god targets with a stack of Rupture are damaged and restore health as if they had 3 stacks.

A04.name: Destruction
A04.description:
Become immune to death, displacement, slows, and roots. Deal Physical Damage to nearby enemies every 0.25s for its duration.

  • If you are below 15% Health when the ultimate ends, you are restored to 15% of your Health
  • Each hit applies 1 stack of Rupture

passive.name: Marked For Death
passive.description:
Mark a god. Gain Physical Penetration against that god. Killing that god restores  Health. Assists restore less Health. You also gain bonus gold bounty. Additionally, Basic Attacks and most abilities apply Rupture to enemies. 

  • If a marked target dies, the enemy god closest to Kali becomes marked
  • You can use 'Interact' in the fountain to change your marked target

allDescriptions.Kali.Passive.Description.InGame:
Mark a god. Gain Physical Penetration against that god. Killing that god restores {HealFull}% Health. Assists restore {HealReduced}% Health. You also gain +{Gold}% gold bounty. Additionally, Basic Attacks and most abilities apply Rupture to enemies.

  • If a marked target dies, the enemy god closest to Kali becomes marked
  • You can use 'Interact' in the fountain to change your marked target
allDescriptions.Kali.Passive.Description.OutOfGame:
Mark a god. Gain Physical Penetration against that god. Killing that god restores  Health. Assists restore less Health. You also gain bonus gold bounty. Additionally, Basic Attacks and most abilities apply Rupture to enemies. 

  • If a marked target dies, the enemy god closest to Kali becomes marked
  • You can use 'Interact' in the fountain to change your marked target
allDescriptions.Kali.Passive.Description.InGame.Talent:

  • If a marked target dies, the enemy god closest to Kali becomes marked
  • Rupture is consumed upon reaching 5 stacks, dealing damage and healing you
  • You can use 'Interact' in the fountain to change your marked target
allDescriptions.Kali.Passive.Description.OutOfGame.Talen:
