  • Rupture is consumed upon reaching 5 stacks, dealing damage and healing you
  • You can use 'Interact' in the fountain to change your marked target

A01.name: Abduct
A01.description:
Lunge forward, grabbing and pulling backwards the first enemy god hit.

• This deals Magical Damage
• Gain Physical Protection and Magical Protection while pulling a god while pulling a god and for 3s afterwards
• The lunge damages enemies you pass through

A02.name: Rising Dawn
A02.description:
Roll the sun forward, setting ablaze all enemies it touches.

• Affected enemies repeatedly take Magical Damage over time
• Affected enemies have reduced Physical Protection.
• Allies hit gain Damage Mitigation
• After reaching max distance the sun sets, reapplying all effects in a larger area.

A03.name: Solar Flare
A03.description: Call down the sun's ire, dealing Magical Damage and Rooting enemies in an area.

A04.name: Scarab's Blessing
A04.description:
Bless an allied god for 5s. If the blessed ally would die while blessed, they are instead revived at Khepri's location.

• Blessed allies are cleansed of crowd control effects
• Blessed allies receive Strength, Intelligence, and Movement Speed
• Blessed allies are Slow Immune
• Successfully Revive an Ally to gain a permanently stacking buff of 2 Protections

passive.name: Fortitude
passive.description:
Every 5s apply a 2% Health Shield to yourself and nearby allies.

• The interval is increased to 10s if you have taken or dealt damage in the last 5s

allDescriptions.Khepri.PSV.InGame.Short:
Every 5s apply a 2% Health Shield to yourself and nearby allies.

• The interval is increased to 10s if you have taken or dealt damage in the last 5s
allDescriptions.Khepri.PSV.OutOfGame:
Every 5s apply a 2% Health Shield to yourself and nearby allies.

• The interval is increased to 10s if you have taken or dealt damage in the last 5s

A01.name: Zephyr
A01.description:
Fire a projectile that explodes on the first enemy hit. The explosion deals Magical Damage and Slows enemies in the area.

  • Damaged enemies are also Slowed

A02.name: Slipstream
A02.description: Summon the wind to become Slow Immune and gain Movement Speed that fades over time.   • Activate this within a Whirlwind to Dash, dealing Magical Damage and Slowing enemies hit

A03.name: Whirlwind
A03.description:
Create a Whirlwind, which spreads onto all enemies that enter its area.

  • Affected enemies repeatedly take Magical Damage over time, even if they leave the area

A04.name: Spirit Of The Nine Winds
A04.description:
Summon the Spirit of the Nine Winds to deal Magical Damage in a large path.

  • Enemies hit are also Knocked Back

passive.name: Power Of The Wind Jewel
passive.description: As you build items that provide Mana, you gain bonus Intelligence.

allDescriptions.Kukulkan.PSV.InGame.Long: This effect does not scale off Base God Mana.
allDescriptions.Kukulkan.PSV.InGame.Short: As you build items that provide Mana, you gain bonus Intelligence.
allDescriptions.Kukulkan.PSV.OutOfGame: As you build items that provide Mana, you gain bonus Intelligence.
allDescriptions.Kukulkan.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Short:
As you build items that provide Mana, you gain bonus Intelligence.
  • Jungle Monster kills and god kills and assists provide bonus Mana
allDescriptions.Kukulkan.Talent.1.PSV.OutOfGame:
As you build items that provide Mana, you gain bonus Intelligence.
  • Jungle Monster kills and god kills and assists provide bonus Mana

talentVariants.Kukulkan.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Short:
As you build items that provide Mana, you gain bonus Intelligence.
  • Jungle Monster kills and god kills and assists provide bonus Mana
talentVariants.Kukulkan.Talent.1.PSV.OutOfGame:
As you build items that provide Mana, you gain bonus Intelligence.
  • Jungle Monster kills and god kills and assists provide bonus Mana

A01.name: Vanish
A01.description:
Disappear in a puff of smoke, become Stealthed and gain Movement Speed. 

  • Your next basic attack deals additional Physical Damage over time
  • Killing a god resets the cooldown of this ability
  • You are Immune to Slows while Stealthed

A02.name: Agonizing Visions
A02.description:
Summon a vision of Loki that repeatedly deals Physical Damage to nearby enemies.

  • Damaged enemies have reduced damage
  • Enemies hit four times are Blinded

A03.name: Flurry Strike
A03.description:
Unleash a flurry of dagger strikes, dealing Physical Damage repeatedly and Slowing enemies in front of you. 

  • The final hit deals  bonus Physical Damage and applies a stronger Slow
  • This is a Channeled ability
  • You are Displacement Immune  while Channeling

A04.name: Assassinate
A04.description:
Teleport to the target location, then strike twice to assassinate a foe.

  • The first strike deals Physical Damage and Cripple enemies in the area
  • The second strike deals Physical Damage and Stuns enemies in front of you

passive.name: Behind You
passive.description: Hitting enemies from behind deals bonus damage.

allDescriptions.Loki.PSV.InGame.Long: The increased damage from this effect also triggers on enemies Blinded by Agonizing Visions
allDescriptions.Loki.PSV.InGame.Short: Hitting enemies from behind deals bonus damage.
allDescriptions.Loki.PSV.OutOfGame: Hitting enemies from behind deals bonus damage.
allDescriptions.Loki.Talent.1.PSV.Ingame: Hitting enemies from behind deals {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] bonus damage.

talentVariants.Loki.Talent.1.PSV.Ingame: Hitting enemies from behind deals {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] bonus damage.

A01.name: Viper Shot
A01.description:
Gain increased Attack Speed and augment your next 4 Basic Attacks, shooting vipers that poison the targets hit, dealing Physical Damage every 0.5s for 1.5s.

 • Each successful hit on an enemy god reduces the Cooldown of this ability by 0.5s

A02.name: Acid Spray
A02.description:
Spit acid that deals Physical Damage to the first enemy hit, then spraying out in a cone behind them.
 
• Enemies hit have their Healing Taken reduced for 5s
• Acid Spray will explode on statues Medusa has created

A03.name: Lacerate
A03.description:
Slither forward, dealing Physical Damage to all enemies you pass through.

• The first enemy god you encounter causes you to stop before damaging and Rooting the god hit

A04.name: Petrify
A04.description:
Remove your mask, revealing your true face to deliver a powerful blast from your horrifying gorgon gaze.

• Enemies are dealt Physical Damage and Stunned if they look at you
• Enemies are dealt reduced Physical Damage and Slowed if they are not looking at you
• You are CC Immune while using this ability

passive.name: Sidewinder
passive.description: You suffer no movement penalty when strafing and half the movement penalty when backpedaling.

allDescriptions.Medusa.PSV.InGame.Short: You suffer no movement penalty when strafing and half the movement penalty when backpedaling.
allDescriptions.Medusa.PSV.OutOfGame: You suffer no movement penalty when strafing and half the movement penalty when backpedaling.

A01.name: Eclipse
A01.description:
Conjure a celestial orb that grows in size as it travels, dealing Magical Damage to enemies and marking them.
   • Marked enemies take additional Magical Damage if they stay within the outer range of Eclipse

A02.name: Vortex
A02.description: Deploy a field of arcane energy. After a delay, the Vortex deals Magical Damage and Pulls enemies towards the center.

A03.name: Flicker
A03.description:
You quickly Teleport a short distance. Depending on your current Stance, you gain different effects when using this ability.

• Arcane: Heal 22.5% of the damage taken within the last 4s
• Fire: For 4s, your basic attacks apply the Radiate Burn to enemies hit
• Ice: Ability Cooldowns are reduced 2s

A04.name: Elemental Mastery
A04.description:
Tap into your inner potential, exploding with energy in your current stance dealing Magical Damage to enemies hit.
  • After the explosion reaches its apex, it collapses in on itself dealing Magical Damage again
  • Enemies suffer different effects depending on which stance's energy they are being hit by

passive.name: Overload
passive.description: Using an ability provides 1 stack of Overload. Firing a basic attack consumes 1 stack of Overload and deals Magical Damage to enemies hit.

allDescriptions.Merlin.PSV.InGame.Short: Using an ability provides 1 stack of Overload. Firing a basic attack consumes 1 stack of Overload and deals {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Magical Damage to enemies hit.
allDescriptions.Merlin.PSV.OutOfGame: Using an ability provides 1 stack of Overload. Firing a basic attack consumes 1 stack of Overload and deals Magical Damage to enemies hit.
allDescriptions.Merlin.PSV.InGame.Long: The damage from this ability can trigger ability item effects.

A01.name: Cruel Strikes
A01.description:
Strike twice with your swords.

   • First Slash, dealing Physical Damage to enemies in front of you
   • Then Slam, dealing Physical Damage to enemies in a line and either dealing bonus damage or Healing, based on your Basic Attack Chain

A02.name: Bloodrage
A02.description:
Deal Physical Damage to enemies around you, then gain increased Attack Speed and Movement Speed.   

   • While buffed, basic attack hits on enemies apply stacks, reducing their Protections and increasing your own as well as providing bonus Attack Speed
   • Hitting an enemy god with the initial hit of this attack applies two stacks

A03.name: Severing Slice
A03.description:
Fire a projectile that deals Physical Damage and Slows enemies.  

  • Direct hits with the center of the projectile cause targets to Bleed, taking Bonus Physical Damage as they move.

A04.name: Heart Slash
A04.description:
Deal Physical Damage to enemies in an area in front of you.

If you hit an enemy god, they are Rooted. You then Channel to siphon their lifeforce, gaining a {Shield} Health Shield and Healing over time while dealing Physical Damage repeatedly to that enemy

passive.name: Wrath of the Forsaken
passive.description:
After using an ability or attacking, your Interact key becomes a Dash forward.
   • This deals Physical Damage to enemies hit

allDescriptions.Mordred.PSV.Charge.InGame.Short:
After using an ability or attacking, your Interact key becomes a Dash forward.
   • This deals {Damage_Formula} Physical Damage to enemies hit
allDescriptions.Mordred.PSV.Charge.OutOfGame:
After using an ability or attacking, your Interact key becomes a Dash forward.
   • This deals Physical Damage to enemies hit
allDescriptions.Mordred.PSV.Charge.InGame.Long: This ability can only be used within 2s of using an ability or basic attack.
allDescriptions.Mordred.PSV.Charge.InGame.Long2: Cooldown starts at 15s and is reduced by 0.2s per level.

   • Your Ultimate Ability Heart Slash can only be used after reaching 40 Wrath
   • Your Ultimate Ability Pursue the Weak can only be used after reaching 80 Wrath

   • Hitting enemy gods with this ability provides a stack that causes your next Shoulder Charge to deal bonus damage

A01.name: Sigil Mastery
A01.description:
Summon a crashing sword, imbued by your chosen sigil, dealing Magical Damage before exploding dealing Magical Damage.

• Mark of Mind, Fear enemy gods away from the center of the sigil
• Mark of Body, create a Slowing field that persists for 4s
• Mark of Soul, spawn a clone at the enemy god location

A02.name: Dragonflight
A02.description:
Summon a dragon that deals Magical Damage and Knocks Up enemies. The dragon then flies forward, dealing Magical Damage and Knocking Back enemies hit.

• Applies Mark of Spirit to enemy gods hit

A03.name: Shroud of Wildfire
A03.description:
Send out Wildfire that explodes at max range or when it hits an enemy god, dealing Magical Damage in a small area and afflicts enemies with a Debuff.
Enemies debuffed take Magical Damage.
Enemy gods and Jungle Bosses debuffed explode for Magical Damage when hit by your Attacks.
If an enemy uses a Movement ability while debuffed, they take Magical Damage and the debuff is removed.

• Using this ability increases your Movement Speed for a short duration
• Your Attacks extend the debuff on enemies
• Applies Mark of Matter to enemy gods hit

A04.name: Consuming Power
A04.description:
Consume Marks from enemy gods dealing Magical Damage and empowering you. For a short duration, fire out 3 strikes of dark energy dealing Magical Damage and Healing you.

  • The center of the final strike deals bonus damage based on the enemy's Max Health.
  • You are CC Immune during this ability.

passive.name: Empowered Blade
passive.description: Damaging enemy gods with abilities Marks them and activates a shared Symbol on your sword, providing Mana Regen. After gaining all 5 Symbols you become empowered temporarily, causing your Cooldowns to be decreased and providing Intelligence and Mana Regen. Additionally you gain 1 stack of permanent Intelligence and bonus healing towards Consuming Power.

allDescriptions.MorganLeFay.PSV.Compact: Mark Enemies with Abilities to Become Stronger
allDescriptions.MorganLeFay.PSV.OutOfGame: Damaging enemy gods with abilities Marks them and activates a shared Symbol on your sword, providing Mana Regen. After gaining all 5 Symbols you become empowered temporarily, causing your Cooldowns to be decreased and providing Intelligence and Mana Regen. Additionally you gain 1 stack of permanent Intelligence and bonus healing towards Consuming Power.
allDescriptions.MorganLeFay.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Short:
Damaging enemy gods with abilities Marks them and activates a shared Symbol on your sword, providing Mana Regen. After gaining all 5 Symbols you gain 1 stack of permanent Health.

Hit enemies to gain Wrath.
   • The first level of Your Ultimate Ability Consuming Power can only be used after reaching 40 Wrath
   • The second level at 80 Wrath
allDescriptions.MorganLeFay.PSV.InGame.Short: Damaging enemy gods with abilities Marks them and activates a shared Symbol on your sword, providing Mana Regen. A01.name: Cross Strike
A01.description:
Strike twice with your sword, dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage to all enemies hit.

  • Skilled: Gain an Attack Speed increase after using this ability.
  • Adept: Perform a third strike in an extended cone in front of you, dealing {ExtraDamage_Formula} [{ExtraDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage.
  • Mastered: Permanently gain Attack Speed.

A02.name: Spear Thrust
A02.description:
Thrust your spear forward, striking enemies in front of you, Slowing them and dealing {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage.

  • Skilled: Heal for up to 3 enemies hit.
  • Adept: Strike a second time with increased range, dealing bonus {Damage_Bonus_Formula} [{Damage_Bonus_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage if the same enemy is hit twice.
  • Mastered: Permanently gain Strength.

A03.name: Grapple
A03.description:
Fire an arrow with a rope attached. If it hits an enemy god, Stun them, deal {ArrowDamage_Formula} [{ArrowDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage, and pull them toward you while dashing at them and following up with a slash for {BonusDamage_Formula} [{BonusDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage.

  • Skilled: Gain a Protections buff after hitting an enemy god.
  • Adept: Dash can now target walls.
  • Mastered: Permanently gain Protections.

A04.name: Divine Mastery
A04.description:
Unleash your entire arsenal, dashing forward with sword slashes that deal {SwordDamage_Formula} [{SwordDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage and Root enemies.

  • Follow up by using divine energy to Knock Up enemies with your spear, dealing {SpearDamage_Formula} [{SpearDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage.
  • Finish with a powerful projectile attack from your bow, dealing {ArrowDamage_Formula} [{ArrowDamage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage.

passive.name: Training Arc
passive.description:
Utilize your Sword, Spear, and Bow with your abilities to gain Skill towards them by damaging enemies. Your expertise in each weapon enhances their respective abilities.

Additionally, gain two unique benefits:
  • Training Arc reduces the cooldown of your next non-ultimate ability.
  • Training Grounds, a consumable which provides team-wide speed & grants Training Arc.

allDescriptions.Mulan.PSV.InGame.Short:
Utilize your Sword, Spear, and Bow with your abilities to gain Skill towards them by damaging enemies. Your expertise in each weapon enhances their respective abilities.

Additionally, gain two unique benefits:
  • Training Arc reduces the cooldown of your next non-ultimate ability.
  • Training Grounds, a consumable which provides team-wide speed & grants Training Arc.
allDescriptions.Mulan.PSV.OutOfGame.Short:
Utilize your Sword, Spear, and Bow with your abilities to gain Skill towards them by damaging enemies. Your expertise in each weapon enhances their respective abilities.

Additionally, gain two unique benefits:
  • Training Arc reduces the cooldown of your next non-ultimate ability.
  • Training Grounds, a consumable which provides team-wide speed & grants Training Arc.
allDescriptions.Mulan.PSV.InGame.Long: Damage to non-god targets contributes 70% less skill progression.

A01.name: Spirit Arrow
A01.description:
Fire a Spirit Arrow projectile that deals Physical Damage and Roots enemies.

  • This ability detonates Weaves that it hits
  • This arrow passes through everything

A02.name: Unravel
A02.description:
Unravel the world weaves, dealing Physical Damage to enemies in an area.

  • This ability creates a Weave
  • You Heal for each enemy  hit
  • Hitting a god Heals for more

A03.name: Back Flip
A03.description:
Deal Physical Damage and Slow enemies in front of you, then Leap backwards.

  • This ability detonates Weaves that it hits

A04.name: World Weaver
A04.description:
Charge up and fire an arrow across the world, locked on to an enemy god and ignoring obstacles.

  • The arrow deals Physical Damage and Stuns 
  • You can fire the arrow before it is fully charged, but it will deal less damage

passive.name: Broken Weave
passive.description:
Your abilities either create or detonate Weaves.

  • Detonating Weaves deals Physical Damage to nearby enemies and Roots them
  • You gain a stacking Attack Speed and Intelligence increase per Weave detonated

allDescriptions.Neith.PSV.InGame.Short:
Your abilities either create or detonate Weaves.

  • Detonating Weaves deals {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage to nearby enemies and Roots them
  • You gain a stacking Attack Speed and Intelligence increase per Weave detonated
allDescriptions.Neith.PSV.OutOfGame:
Your abilities either create or detonate Weaves.

  • Detonating Weaves deals Physical Damage to nearby enemies and Roots them
  • You gain a stacking Attack Speed and Intelligence increase per Weave detonated

  • Detonating Weaves deals {Damage_Formula} [{Damage_Scaling_Percent}] Physical Damage to nearby enemies
  • You gain a stacking Attack Speed and Intelligence increase per Weave detonated

A01.name: Convergence
A01.description:
Your Attacks fire two additional projectiles that deal Magical Damage. These and your Attack pass through enemies.

Astral Flux: Consumes 4 stacks to cause targets to lose Protections.

A02.name: Crashing Comet
A02.description:
Call down a comet that deals Magical Damage where it lands and less Magical Damage in an area around it.

  • Enemies in the center are Rooted
  • Enemies on the edge are Trembled

Astral Flux: Consumes 4 stacks to cause the comet to echo, damaging and trembling again.

A03.name: Warp
A03.description:
Teleport in the direction you are moving and fire homing projectiles at nearby enemies that deal Magical Damage and applies a stacking slow. Subsequent hits deal 33% damage.

Stellar Flux: Resets the Cooldown of Convergence and grants 8 Ammo.
Astral Flux: Consumes 4 stacks to fire 2 additional projectiles.

A04.name: Skyfall
A04.description:
Become CC Immune and ascend into the sky. Fire a massive black hole that deals Magical Damage before detonating for additional Magical Damage and  Pulling enemies toward the center.

  • Grants 2 stacks of Flux for each God hit

passive.name: Flux
passive.description:
While Strength exceeds Intelligence, Ability hits grant Stellar Flux which provides Attack Speed. Stacks decay every 3s.

Otherwise, Basic Attacks grant Astral Flux. Abilities consume this for Bonus Magical Damage and effects. 

Both stack up to 10.

allDescriptions.Nut.Passive.InGame:
While Strength exceeds Intelligence, Ability hits grant Stellar Flux which provides Attack Speed. Stacks decay every 3s.

Otherwise, Basic Attacks grant Astral Flux. Abilities consume this for Bonus Magical Damage and effects. 

Both stack up to 10.
allDescriptions.Nut.Aspect.Passive.InGame:
Cosmic Flux: Hitting enemies with Basic Attacks or Abilities grants stacks of Cosmic Flux up to 20. 

When stacks above 10 decays, you Heal the lowest health nearby ally.

A01.name: Lunge
A01.description:
Leap forward, dealing Physical Damage to nearby enemies as you land.

  • If you have a Shield from Raven Shout, it explodes upon landing

A02.name: Raven Shout
A02.description:
Gain a Health Shield for a duration.

  • After the duration, the Shield explodes dealing Physical Damage equal to the remaining Shield Health to nearby enemies
  • If the Shield is at full HP when it explodes, it deals Bonus Physical Damage

A03.name: Gungnir's Might
A03.description:
Charge up, pulsing damage around you twice, then throw your spear.  

  • The pulses deal Physical Damage and Slow  
  • The spear deals Physical Damage and Stuns if fired after two pulses. Can only stun the first god hit 
  • If you refire the spear early, nearby allies get Attack Speed and this ability has a 20% reduced cooldown

A04.name: Ring Of Spears
A04.description:
Create a spear ring of walls that impedes enemies. Enemy gods who die in the ring grant Odin a permanent STR and INT buff. Max 10 Stacks. Gain a stack of Path to Valhalla.

  • Enemies in the area cannot Heal, and have reduced Strength and Intelligence
  • Enemies who leave the area take Physical Damage and are Slowed, unless exiting through segment of the ring destroyed by basic attacks

passive.name: Path to Valhalla
passive.description: When a god dies, gain a brief increase to Movement Speed, Strength, and Intelligence.

allDescriptions.Odin.PSV.InGame.Long: This can trigger off allied or enemy god deaths, and has no max range.
allDescriptions.Odin.PSV.InGame.Short: When a god dies, gain a brief increase to Movement Speed, Strength, and Intelligence.
allDescriptions.Odin.PSV.OutOfGame: When a god dies, gain a brief increase to Movement Speed, Strength, and Intelligence.

A01.name: Sickle Strike
A01.description:
Throw your Sickle, dealing Physical Damage and Slowing the first god hit. It passes through minions.

• If a god is hit, the Sickle persists for the Slow duration
• Deals 75% Physical Damage to minions

A02.name: Spirit Flail
A02.description:
Strike the target area with your flail, dealing Physical Damage and granting Movement Speed.

• Enemies affected by Sickle Strike have their Slow increased in power and duration

A03.name: Judgement Tether
A03.description:
Tether yourself to nearby enemy gods. Tethered enemies have reduced Attack Speed and reduced Damage for 4s.

• The tether breaks if targets move far enough away
• Targets still in range when the duration expires are Stunned

A04.name: Lord of the Afterlife
A04.description:
Leap to a target location, dealing Physical Damage and Rooting enemies. Apply negative Cooldown Reduction and Healing Prevention to enemy gods hit.

• On Use: Immediately max Fragment Stacks

passive.name: Fragmented
passive.description:
Lose a Fragment of your body each time you use an ability, gaining +2% Damage Mitigation for each missing Fragment.

• After losing 8 fragments, become a spirit for 6 successful Basic Attacks: walk through enemies and enemy blockers, gain Attack Speed, and your Basic Attacks ignore movement penalty

allDescriptions.Osiris.Passive.OutOfGame:
Lose a Fragment of your body each time you use an ability, gaining +2% Damage Mitigation for each missing Fragment.

• After losing 8 fragments, become a spirit for 6 successful Basic Attacks: walk through enemies and enemy blockers, gain Attack Speed, and your Basic Attacks ignore movement penalty
allDescriptions.Osiris.Passive.InGame:
Lose a Fragment of your body each time you use an ability, gaining +2% Damage Mitigation for each missing Fragment.

• After losing 8 Fragments, become a spirit for 6 successful Basic Attacks: walk through enemies and enemy blockers, gain Attack Speed, and your Basic Attacks ignore movement penalty
allDescriptions.Osiris.Passive.InGame.Talent:
Lose a Fragment of your body every 4s, on ability use, and on god hit with an ability. Restore your body by using Sickle Strike.

• While your body is whole, gain 16% Damage Dealt Increase. Each Fragment lost removes -2% Damage Dealt but grants +2% Damage Mitigation
allDescriptions.Osiris.Passive.OutOfGame.Talent:
Lose a Fragment of your body every 4s, on ability use, and on god hit with an ability. Restore your body by using Sickle Strike.

• While your body is whole, gain 16% Damage Dealt Increase. Each Fragment lost removes -2% Damage Dealt but grants +2% Damage Mitigation
allDescriptions.Osiris.Passive.ExtraText.1.Talent: The 4s passive Fragment loss is reduced by Cooldown Rate
allDescriptions.Osiris.Passive.ExtraText.1: While a Spirit, when you would lose a Fragment instead gain an additional Spirit Basic Attack (up to 6)

A01.name: Pyroclast
A01.description:
Fires a Magma projectile that deals Physical Damage and grants fuel per enemy god hit. At max range the Magma persists and fires additional shard projectiles back to you, dealing Physical Damage to enemies. 

  • The number of shards returning is dependent on the rank of this ability. 
  • Pele has 2 charges of this ability.

A02.name: Eruption
A02.description:
Gain a burst of speed before dealing Physical Damage and Knocking Up enemies around you.
At ranks 3 and 5 this area gains an additional explosion areas, which deal Physical Damage and a smaller Knock Up.

  • Activating this ability while in the amplified state of Magma Rush will cause you to dash a short distance before erupting.

A03.name: Magma Rush
A03.description:
Repeatedly deal Physical Damage to nearby enemies and gain movement speed while this ability is active. Magma Rush uses Fuel for its duration and has no cooldown. 

  • Reactivate this ability to amplify the effect, expending more fuel but dealing increased Physical Damage and gaining additional movement speed.

A04.name: Volcanic Lightning
A04.description:
Become CC Immune then Dash forward dealing Physical Damage and Slowing the first enemy God hit, and firing a cone attack that deals Physical Damage to other enemies. 

  • For the next 10 seconds or 4 attacks, every time you basic attack an enemy, you deal reduced damage and also fire a cone attack.

passive.name: Everlasting Flame
passive.description: When you drop below 50% health, gain increased Strength and Lifesteal. This effect has a cooldown.

allDescriptions.Pele.PSV.InGame.Short: When you drop below 50% health, gain increased Strength and Lifesteal. This effect has a cooldown.
allDescriptions.Pele.PSV.OutOfGame: When you drop below 50% health, gain increased Strength and Lifesteal. This effect has a cooldown.
allDescriptions.Pele.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Short:
When you drop below 50% health, gain increased Physical and Magical Protections. This effect has a cooldown. 
Additionally, you gain fuel when damaged by enemies.
allDescriptions.Pele.Talent.1.PSV.OutOfGame:
When you drop below 50% health, gain increased Physical and Magical Protections. This effect has a cooldown.
Additionally, you gain fuel when damaged by enemies.

talentVariants.Pele.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Short:
When you drop below 50% health, gain increased Physical and Magical Protections. This effect has a cooldown. 
Additionally, you gain fuel when damaged by enemies.
talentVariants.Pele.Talent.1.PSV.OutOfGame:
When you drop below 50% health, gain increased Physical and Magical Protections. This effect has a cooldown.
Additionally, you gain fuel when damaged by enemies.

A01.name: Tidal Surge
A01.description:
Summon a wave, dealing Magical Damage and Knock Back enemies. Activate while Trident is active to send out two additional waves.

  • Subsequent wave hits deal 50% less damage
  • Tide Cost -15%
  • These waves pass through everything

A02.name: Trident
A02.description:
Activate your Trident, gaining increased Attack Speed, Movement Speed, and Basic Attack Damage. While activated, Tidal Surge and Basic Attacks fire two additional shots.

  • The additional Basic Attack shots apply ability damage and trigger ability on-hit effects
  • All Basic Attack shots increase Tide on successful hit
  • This ability does not cost Tide

A03.name: Whirlpool
A03.description:
Summon a whirlpool, Crippling, Vortexing, and dealing Magical Damage repeatedly to enemies in an area.

  • Tide Cost -15%

A04.name: Release the Kraken!
A04.description:
Summon the Kraken, dealing Magical Damage and Slowing enemies in its area. Enemies in the center area when it spawns take increased Magical Damage and are Stunned and Knocked Up.

  • Tide Cost -20%

passive.name: Changing Tides
passive.description: Successfully hit basic attacks to gain Tide. You have increased Movement Speed and your abilities do additional damage based on the amount of Tide you have. Using abilities decreases Tide.

allDescriptions.Poseidon.PSV.InGame.Short: Successfully hit basic attacks to gain Tide. You have increased Movement Speed and your abilities do additional damage based on the amount of Tide you have. Using abilities decreases Tide.
allDescriptions.Poseidon.PSV.InGame.Long: Each successful Basic Attack generates 10% Tide
allDescriptions.Poseidon.PSV.InGame.Long2: At Max Tide Movement Speed is increased by 10%
allDescriptions.Poseidon.PSV.InGame.Long3: At Max Tide abilities do 15% increased damage
allDescriptions.Poseidon.PSV.OutOfGame: Successfully hit basic attacks to gain Tide. You have increased Movement Speed and your abilities do additional damage based on the amount of Tide you have. Using abilities decreases Tide.

A01.name: Celestial Beam
A01.description: Summon a moving beam of intense light, dealing Magical Damage to enemies.

A02.name: Divine Light
A02.description:
Emanate light in the area around you that repeatedly Slows enemies before exploding dealing Magical Damage.

  • For a period after activation, basic attacking fires solar rays, dealing Magical Damage
  • The solar rays count as abilities, trigger ability effects at 50% effectiveness, and pierce targets
  • Enemies looking at you gain additional Slow stacks and are Blinded by the explosion

A03.name: Solar Blessing
A03.description:
Summon a pillar of blessed light repeatedly dealing Magical Damage and Healing allies.

 • The light empowers you and allied gods in the area, granting Strength, Intelligence, Physical Protection, and Magical Protection

A04.name: Searing Pain
A04.description:
Blast enemies in front of you with a wave of extreme heat, dealing Magical Damage.

• Deals bonus damage to gods based on their maximum Health

passive.name: Speed of Light
passive.description:
After using an ability gain Movement Speed.

• This buff stacks up to 3 times

allDescriptions.Ra.PSV.InGame.Short:
After using an ability gain Movement Speed.

• This buff stacks up to 3 times
allDescriptions.Ra.PSV.OutOfGame:
After using an ability gain Movement Speed.

• This buff stacks up to 3 times

A01.name: Astral Strike
A01.description:
Switch to a more powerful arrow that deals bonus Physical Damage, pierces, and Slows enemies.

• While this ability is active, each Basic Attack consumes 1 Astral Arrow and Mana.

A02.name: Infinite Arrows
A02.description:
Focus your mind and gain increased Attack Speed.

• When activating this ability, if there are any dropped Astral Arrows within 8.8m of you, automatically collect them.
• While this buff is active, every third successful Basic Attack on an enemy god will immediately generate an Astral Arrow.

A03.name: Rolling Assault
A03.description:
Roll in the direction you are currently traveling.

• For the next 5s after rolling, your next Basic Attack will have Haste and consume an Astral Arrow, Crippling all enemies hit and dealing bonus Physical Damage.

A04.name: Astral Barrage
A04.description: Launch yourself into the air for up to 5s and shoot 3 powerful arrows at the ground, with each successive shot dealing increasing Physical Damage while decreasing in size.

passive.name: Astral Quiver
passive.description:
Your Astral Quiver generates an Astral Arrow every 12s. 

• The first time your Basic Attack hits reduce the time to generate an Astral Arrow by 3s.
• The first time a fired Astral Arrow hits an enemy, it has a chance to drop to the ground.
• Dropped Astral Arrows last for 10s, and picking one up restores 10 Mana.

allDescriptions.Rama.PSV.InGame.Short:
Your Astral Quiver generates an Astral Arrow every 12s. 

• The first time your Basic Attack hits reduce the time to generate an Astral Arrow by 3s.
• The first time a fired Astral Arrow hits an enemy, it has a chance to drop to the ground.
• Dropped Astral Arrows last for 10s, and picking one up restores 10 Mana.
allDescriptions.Rama.PSV.OutOfGame:
Your Astral Quiver generates an Astral Arrow every 12s. 

• The first time your Basic Attack hits reduce the time to generate an Astral Arrow by 3s.
• The first time a fired Astral Arrow hits an enemy, it has a chance to drop to the ground.
• Dropped Astral Arrows last for 10s, and picking one up restores 10 Mana.
allDescriptions.Rama.PSV.InGame.Long1: You can hold up to 5 Astral Arrows.
allDescriptions.Rama.PSV.InGame.Long2: You always respawn with a full Astral Quiver.
allDescriptions.Rama.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Short:
Your Basic Attacks cost Astral Arrows.

• When you run out of Astral Arrows, you automatically reload.
• You can reload at any time by using the cancel input.
• Reload time is scaled down with Attack Speed.
• The first time a fired Astral Arrow hits an enemy, it has a chance to drop to the ground.
• Dropped Astral Arrows last for 10s, and picking one up restores 10 Mana.

• You can reload at any time by using the cancel input.
• Reload time is scaled down with Attack Speed.
• The first time a fired Astral Arrow hits an enemy, it has a chance to drop to the ground.
• Dropped Astral Arrows last for 10s, and picking one up restores 10 Mana.

A01.name: Dart
A01.description:
Dash forward, dealing Physical Damage and Slowing enemies hit, stopping on enemy gods.
  • Cooldown is reduced when dealing damage to enemy gods with other abilities. Once per ability, per god.

Briskberry Acorn
  • Dart is shorter, wider and now passes through enemy gods. Its Cooldown is reset on enemy god hit. It cannot be reset more than twice.

A02.name: Flurry
A02.description:
Spin 4 times and deal Physical Damage to enemies around you, reducing their Physical Protection.

Ashwhorl Acorn
  • Flurry sends out 8 Acorns in a circle that freeze in the air before returning back to you, dealing Physical Damage and providing Attack Speed per enemy god hit.

A03.name: Acorn Blast
A03.description:
Fire a blast of 3 Acorns that deal Physical Damage. Enemies hit by 3 Acorns are Stunned.

Thistlethorn Acorn
  • Acorn Blast fires 3 Acorns that deal Physical Damage and stick to enemy gods or freeze at max range. After a short delay they explode dealing Physical Damage.
  • Damage is no longer reduced by subsequent hits.

A04.name: Through the Cosmos
A04.description:
Fly into the sky. Choose and leap to a location, up to twice, before landing at a final location dealing Physical Damage and Knocking Up enemies.

  • You are CC Immune during this ability

passive.name: Acorn of Yggdrasil
passive.description: You spawn with a Magic Acorn in your inventory. This can be upgraded anywhere on the map to provide different bonuses.

allDescriptions.Ratatoskr.PSV.InGame.Short: You spawn with a Magic Acorn in your inventory. This can be upgraded anywhere on the map to provide different bonuses.
allDescriptions.Ratatoskr.PSV.OutOfGame: You spawn with a Magic Acorn in your inventory. This can be upgraded anywhere on the map to provide different bonuses.
allDescriptions.Ratatoskr.PSV.InGame.Long: After purchasing an Acorn, you cannot perform other actions and are Rooted for 0.7s.
allDescriptions.Ratatoskr.PSV.Compact: Enhance your abilities with a Acorn items.

A01.name: Sic 'Em
A01.description:
Send two hounds forward, Rooting, Crippling, and dealing Magical Damage.

• At max rank, the two closest enemies to the first target will also be hit.

A02.name: Crush
A02.description:
Creates a magical field that Slows enemies. After 5s it detonates, dealing Magical Damage.
 
  • At max rank, enemies in the area also have their Magical Protection reduced and the field persists if detonated early.
  • This ability does 20% bonus damage to Minions and Jungle Monsters.

A03.name: Sentinel
A03.description:
Summon a sentinel at the target area, granting vision of enemies for 5s. Reactivate the ability to Leap to the sentinel location and gain a buff that causes your next Basic Attack to deal Magical Damage.

   • At max rank, hitting an enemy god with the empowered Basic Attack reduces your active ability cooldowns.

A04.name: I'm a Monster
A04.description:
Become CC Immune for the next 6s, and gain Movement Speed. Reactivate to deal Magical Damage at the target area.

  • If you kill an enemy god with this attack, the duration resets and you may attack again.
  • Whenever this ability deals damage to enemy gods you gain 1 stack, killing enemy gods provides 3. At max rank, each stack provides bonus damage to this ability.

passive.name: Quick Learner
passive.description: Your abilities gain an additional effect at max rank. In addition, gain Intelligence and Mana Regen for each max rank ability.

allDescriptions.Scylla.PSV.InGame.Short: Your abilities gain an additional effect at max rank. In addition, gain Intelligence and Mana Regen for each max rank ability.
allDescriptions.Scylla.PSV.OutOfGame: Your abilities gain an additional effect at max rank. In addition, gain Intelligence and Mana Regen for each max rank ability.
allDescriptions.Scylla.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Short:
You cannot gain Mana from other sources but damaging enemies with your non-ultimate abilities provides Mana instead. In addition, gain Intelligence and Mana Regen for each max rank ability.

• You gain 2% of your Max Mana + Mana Cost of the ability used when hitting enemy gods.
allDescriptions.Scylla.Talent.1.PSV.OutOfGame:
You cannot gain Mana from other sources but damaging enemies with your non-ultimate abilities provides Mana instead. In addition, gain Intelligence and Mana Regen for each max rank ability.

• You gain 2% of your Max Mana + Mana Cost of the ability used when hitting enemy gods.

talentVariants.Scylla.Talent.1.PSV.InGame.Short:
You cannot gain Mana from other sources but damaging enemies with your non-ultimate abilities provides Mana instead. In addition, gain Intelligence and Mana Regen for each max rank ability.

• You gain 2% of your Max Mana + Mana Cost of the ability used when hitting enemy gods.
talentVariants.Scylla.Talent.1.PSV.OutOfGame:
You cannot gain Mana from other sources but damaging enemies with your non-ultimate abilities provides Mana instead. In addition, gain Intelligence and Mana Regen for each max rank ability.

• You gain 2% of your Max Mana + Mana Cost of the ability used when hitting enemy gods.

A01.name: Charge Prey
A01.description:
Dash forward. The first enemy hit takes Magical Damage and stops the dash. Sobek displaces the enemy behind him.

  • Damaged enemies are Stunned before being thrown
  • You are Displacement Immune while dashing and CC Immune while throwing

A02.name: Tail Whip
A02.description:
Spin your tail, dealing Magical Damage in an area around Sobek.

  • Damaged enemies are also Displaced away from Sobek

A03.name: Sickening Strike
A03.description:
Strike in front of you. This strike deals Magical Damage in a cone and applies Disease, reducing healing received for 5s.

  • Enemies diseased take Bonus Magical Damage, take Reduced Healing, and can spread the disease for 2.5s
  • Each enemy god hit by the cone reduces this ability's cooldown by 1s and Heals you, up to 4

A04.name: Lurking in the Waters
A04.description:
Submerge, Slowing enemies nearby and granting you CC Immunity, Protections, and Mana Regen. After 4 seconds, emerge dealing Magical Damage to enemies in range.

  • You may cancel this ability early, dealing less damage
  • Executes enemies below 10-25% HP, scaling with time submerged. Executed or killed enemies Heal you 25% of your Maximum Health  and grants 25 permanent bonus Health

passive.name: Blessing of the Nile
passive.description:
When Sobek deals damage he gains a stack of Protections and Cooldown Rate.

  • This effect stacks 3 times and lasts for 10s
  • An ability can only provide one stack per cast

allDescriptions.Sobek.Passive.InGame.Short:
When Sobek deals damage he gains a stack of Protections and Cooldown Rate.

  • This effect stacks 3 times and lasts for 10s
  • An ability can only provide one stack per cast
allDescriptions.Sobek.Passive.OutOfGame:
When Sobek deals damage he gains a stack of Protections and Cooldown Rate.

  • This effect stacks 3 times and lasts for 10s
  • An ability can only provide one stack per cast

A01.name: Radiance
A01.description:
Create a pool of flames and Heal yourself over time for a percentage of your missing Health.

  • Enemies in the pool take Magical Damage repeatedly
  • The size of the pool increases if you have more Heat when using this ability
  • You gain Heat when using this ability

A02.name: Stellar Burst
A02.description:
Your next basic attack fires a projectile that explodes on hit or upon reaching max range, then retracts, and generates Heat.

  • Both the explosion and the retraction deal Magical Damage and Slow

A03.name: Disapparate
A03.description:
Gain Movement Speed and Slow Immunity, gaining Heat and leaving a trail of fire behind you.

  • The Trail deals Magical Damage
  • After 3 seconds, you become Immune and unable to attack, and the trail detonates dealing Magical Damage

A04.name: Supernova
A04.description:
Unleash flame and fury, gaining Heat and striking 8 times along a moveable ground target location.

  • Each strike deals Magical Damage; subsequent hits deal reduced damage
  • The first time an enemy is hit, they are Knocked Back
  • You are CC Immune while using this ability

passive.name: Unstable Manifestation
passive.description:
Hit enemies with basic attacks or use abilities to gain Heat.

  • Heat grants increased Strength, Intelligence, and Attack Speed from items
  • At Max Heat, increase your basic attack damage

allDescriptions.Sol.PSV.InGame.Long2: Heat starts depleting if you have not generated Heat within the last 6 seconds.
allDescriptions.Sol.PSV.InGame.Long3: Heat depletes over time at a rate of 3 heat per 0.33s.
allDescriptions.Sol.PSV.InGame.Short:
Hit enemies with basic attacks or use abilities to gain Heat.

  • Heat grants increased Strength, Intelligence, and Attack Speed from items
  • At Max Heat, increase your basic attack damage
allDescriptions.Sol.PSV.OutOfGame:
Hit enemies with basic attacks or use abilities to gain Heat.

  • Heat grants increased Strength, Intelligence, and Attack Speed from items
  • At Max Heat, increase your basic attack damage
allDescriptions.Sol.PSV.InGame.Talent.Short:
Hit enemies with basic attacks or use abilities to gain Heat.

  • Heat grants increased Intelligence from items
  • At Max Heat, increase your ability damage
allDescriptions.Sol.PSV.InGame.Talent.OutOfGame:
Hit enemies with basic attacks or use abilities to gain Heat.

  • Heat grants increased Intelligence from items
  • At Max Heat, increase your ability damage

talentVariants.Sol.PSV.InGame.Talent.Short:
Hit enemies with basic attacks or use abilities to gain Heat.

  • Heat grants increased Intelligence from items
  • At Max Heat, increase your ability damage
talentVariants.Sol.PSV.InGame.Talent.OutOfGame:
Hit enemies with basic attacks or use abilities to gain Heat.

  • Heat grants increased Intelligence from items
  • At Max Heat, increase your ability damage

A01.name: The Magic Cudgel
A01.description:
Slam down with your Cudgel, dealing Physical Damage.

  • This ability has reduced Strength Scaling but increased Intelligence Scaling to enemies that are further away
  • Intelligence increases the length of this ability

A02.name: Master's Will
A02.description:
Strike around you dealing Physical Damage.
Enemies hit are Slowed and have reduced Attack Speed

  • This ability has reduced Strength Scaling but increased Intelligence Scaling to enemies that are further away
  • Intelligence increases the radius of this ability

A03.name: 72 Transformations
A03.description:
Transform into an Ox, Tiger or Eagle, and charge forward.

  • Ox : Knockback enemies in your path, dealing Physical Damage
  • Tiger : Maul the first enemy you hit, dealing Physical Damage and Stunning them
  • Eagle : Is the fastest of the three forms

A04.name: Somersault Cloud
A04.description:
Rise into a cloud leaving a clone to fight in your stead. While in the cloud you are Stealthed and Heal every 0.5s.

  • Refire to deal Physical Damage.
  • You are CC Immune while using this ability.

passive.name: Undefeated Body
passive.description:
When you drop below 60% health, gain increased Strength, Intelligence, and Protections. If you go above this threshold, the buff persists for a short duration.
When you drop below 30% health, you spawn a clone. This effect has a cooldown.

allDescriptions.SunWukong.PSV.InGame.Short:
When you drop below 60% health, gain increased Strength, Intelligence, and Protections. If you go above this threshold, the buff persists for a short duration.
When you drop below 30% health, you spawn a clone. This effect has a cooldown.
allDescriptions.SunWukong.PSV.OutOfGame:
When you drop below 60% health, gain increased Strength, Intelligence, and Protections. If you go above this threshold, the buff persists for a short duration.
When you drop below 30% health, you spawn a clone. This effect has a cooldown.
allDescriptions.SunWukong.PSV.InGame.Long: Clones use The Magic Cudgel and Master's Will when you do.
allDescriptions.SunWukong.PSV.InGame.Long2: Clones inherit 100% of your Health, Protections, Strength and Intelligence but deal 50% damage and are instantly killed by Hard Crowd Control effects, except Knockbacks and Banishes.

A01.name: Storm Kata
A01.description:
Strike three times in quick succession.

  • The first attack deals Physical Damage to enemies in front of you.
  • The second attack spins, dealing Physical Damage to enemies around you
  • The third attack Dashes forward dealing Physical Damage

A02.name: Wind Siphon
A02.description:
Command the winds to blow, dealing  Physical Damage to enemies in front of you.

  • Enemies in the inner area are also Pulled towards you

A03.name: Jet Stream
A03.description:
Throw a gust of wind projectile that stops on walls or the first enemy hit, creating a whirlwind.   

  • The whirlwind deals Physical Damage repeatedly  
  • You can reactivate this ability to Teleport to the whirlwind

A04.name: Typhoon
A04.description:
Summon a typhoon which repeatedly deals Physical Damage as it grows in size.

  • After reaching full size, the typhoon is launched in the direction you are facing, dealing Physical Damage and Knocking Up enemies
  • Reactivate this ability to fire the typhoon at its current size, dealing less damage

passive.name: Storm's Edge
passive.description:
After using an ability, your next basic attack will add a Storm’s Edge debuff stack to an enemy.

  • At 1 stack, enemies have reduced Strength
  • At 2 stacks, enemies are also Slowed
  • At 3 stacks, enemies also take 10% increased Damage

allDescriptions.Susano.PSV.InGame.Short:
After using an ability, your next basic attack will add a Storm’s Edge debuff stack to an enemy.

  • At 1 stack, enemies have reduced Strength
  • At 2 stacks, enemies are also Slowed
  • At 3 stacks, enemies also take 10% increased Damage
allDescriptions.Susano.PSV.OutOfGame:
After using an ability, your next basic attack will add a Storm’s Edge debuff stack to an enemy.

  • At 1 stack, enemies have reduced Strength
  • At 2 stacks, enemies are also Slowed
  • At 3 stacks, enemies also take 10% increased Damage
allDescriptions.Susano.PSV.InGame.Long: Enemies with 1 stack have 10% reduced Strength.
allDescriptions.Susano.PSV.InGame.Long2: Enemies with 2 stacks are Slowed by 15% and maintain previous Debuff.
allDescriptions.Susano.PSV.InGame.Long3: Enemies with 3 stacks take 10% increased damage and maintain previous Debuffs.
allDescriptions.Susano.PSV.InGame.Long4: Debuffs last 5s and refresh on a new application.
allDescriptions.Susano.PSV.InGame.Long6: Each attack of Storm Kata can trigger ability item effects.

A01.name: Verdant Growth
A01.description:
Throw a pod that deals Magical Damage, applies Protection Reduction, and Roots enemies hit. 

• If it lands on the ground without hitting an enemy, it grows into a Flower after 6s that grants nearby allies Mana Regeneration
• The pod can be destroyed by Basic Attacks, applying Protection Reduction to the destroyer

A02.name: Wisps
A02.description:
Release wisps that restores Health to allies or deals Magical Damageto enemies repeatedly over time. Allies gain Protections while healed.

• The first Wisp tick deals twice the normal amount of damage and healing
• Wisps can revive Wilted Flowers or cause Living Flowers to grant their Protections in an aura

A03.name: Nature's Grasp
A03.description:
Extend a vine that Stuns the first enemy god hit and Pulls them toward you.

• Sylvanus can pull Pods to him, granting a Mana aura for 30s. If Sylvanus drops below 40% Health, he consumes the Aura to gain Wisps

A04.name: Wrath of Terra
A04.description:
Slam the ground, Knocking Up enemies in an area and dealing Magical Damage repeatedly over time.

• If a Pod has been grabbed, consume it to apply Verdant Growth’s Protection Reduction

passive.name: Nature's Bounty
passive.description:
When your abilities hit or are deployed, a seed pod appears. Picking it up restores Mana and reduces your cooldowns. Picking up 8 spawns a pod near Sylvanus.

• Reduces cooldowns by 0.5s; at level 15 the reduction increases to 1s.

allDescriptions.Sylvanus.Passive.InGame:
When your abilities hit or are deployed, a seed pod appears. Picking it up restores Mana and reduces your cooldowns. Picking up 8 spawns a pod near Sylvanus.

• Reduces cooldowns by 0.5s; at level 15 the reduction increases to 1s.
allDescriptions.Sylvanus.Passive.OutOfGame:
When your abilities hit or are deployed, a seed pod appears. Picking it up restores Mana and reduces your cooldowns. Picking up 8 spawns a pod near Sylvanus.

• Reduces cooldowns by 0.5s; at level 15 the reduction increases to 1s.
allDescriptions.Sylvanus.Passive.InGame.Talent:
When your abilities hit or are deployed, a seed pod appears. Picking it up restores Mana and reduces your cooldowns. Picking up 8 spawns a pod near Sylvanus. Each Pod destroyed or allied god slain angers Grover. At 3 stacks of Anger he enrages.

• Reduces cooldowns by 0.5s; at level 15 the reduction increases to 1s. 
• Anger grants Attack Speed. Enrage grants even more Attack Speed and makes your next Nature's Grasp or Wisps free to cast.
allDescriptions.Sylvanus.Passive.OutOfGame.Talent:
When your abilities hit or are deployed, a seed pod appears. Picking it up restores Mana and reduces your cooldowns. Picking up 8 spawns a pod near Sylvanus. Each Pod destroyed or allied god slain angers Grover. At 3 stacks of Anger he enrages.

• Reduces cooldowns by 0.5s; at level 15 the reduction increases to 1s. 
• Anger grants Attack Speed. Enrage grants even more Attack Speed and makes your next Nature's Grasp or Wisps free to cast.
allDescriptions.Sylvanus.Tooltip.Passive.Talent.Angry: "What are you doing!? Nature should thrive, not die!" - Grover

talentVariants.Sylvanus.Tooltip.Passive.Talent.Angry: "What are you doing!? Nature should thrive, not die!" - Grover

A01.name: Mjolnir's Attunement
A01.description:
Throw Mjolnir forward, dealing Physical Damage to enemies as it travels. When it reaches max range it flies back to you.

  • Gods hit by Mjolnir returning to you take 200% damage. Minions take 100% damage
  • Reactivate while Mjolnir is traveling to teleport to and catch Mjolnir

A02.name: Tectonic Rift
A02.description:
Slam Mjolnir down creating a fissure, dealing Physical Damage to enemies as it erupts. Enemies hit are also Stunned.

  • The fissure blocks movement, but allows projectiles to pass through
  • Reactivate to bring the fissure down early

A03.name: Berserker Barrage
A03.description:
Spin, dealing Physical Damage to enemies around you. You spin twice before unleashing a final cone attack that deals Physical Damage to enemies in front of you. 

  • You are Displacement Immune while Channeling
  • Gain 3s of Thunderstruck, causing Mjolnir hits to arc and damage nearby enemies

A04.name: Anvil of Dawn
A04.description:
Fly into the sky. Choose a location to land dealing Physical Damage to enemies when landing. Enemies hit are Stunned.

  • You are CC Immune during this ability
  • You are Thunderstruck for 6s after landing, causing Mjolnir hits to arc and damage nearby enemies

passive.name: Warrior's Madness
passive.description:
You gain Strength for each enemy god near you, up to 3. After using Berserker's Barrage or Anvil of Dawn, you gain Thunderstruck.

  • While Thunderstruck, Mjolnir deals bonus Physical Damage
  • Thunderstruck's damage can arc to up to 2 nearby enemies

allDescriptions.Thor.Passive.InGame.Short:
You gain Strength for each enemy god near you, up to 3. After using Berserker's Barrage or Anvil of Dawn, you gain Thunderstruck.

  • While Thunderstruck, Mjolnir deals bonus Physical Damage
  • Thunderstruck's damage can arc to up to 2 nearby enemies
allDescriptions.Thor.Passive.OutOfGame:
You gain Strength for each enemy god near you, up to 3. After using Berserker's Barrage or Anvil of Dawn, you gain Thunderstruck.

  • While Thunderstruck, Mjolnir deals bonus Physical Damage
  • Thunderstruck's damage can arc to up to 2 nearby enemies
allDescriptions.Thor.Passive.InGame.Long1: Thunderstruck arcs to the nearest enemy within range from the previous hit.
allDescriptions.Thor.Passive.InGame.Long2: An ability can only trigger Thunderstruck once per cast.
allDescriptions.Thor.Passive.InGame.Short.Talent:
You gain Protections for each enemy god near you, up to 3. You always have Thunderstruck.

  • While Thunderstruck, Mjolnir deals bonus Physical Damage
  • Thunderstruck's damage can arc to up to 2 nearby enemies for less damage
  • Gods hit by Thunderstruck 3 times are Trembled and Slowed. You are Healed once per Thunderstruck chain

A01.name: Dark Moon Shuriken
A01.description:
Throw a shuriken that deals Physical Damage to enemies and sticks into the first god hit

 •  Retrieving the shuriken from a god reduces this ability's cooldown
 •  After casting, your next Shingetsu Attack becomes a ranged attack that steals Movement Speed

A02.name: Kusarigama
A02.description:
Perform a three-swing combo with a Kusarigama. The first two swings deal Physical Damage and Disarm enemies. The final swing deals more Damage.

• While Strength is higher than Intelligence, it is • Shingetsu infused. Otherwise, it is • Mangetsu infused
• Shingetsu Infused: Gain Movement Speed and the final swing Stuns
• Mangetsu Infused: The final swing gains +20% Base Damage, +20% Intelligence Scaling, and 3.2m range

A03.name: Silver Moon Caltrops
A03.description:
Scatter Caltrops in an area, dealing Physical Damage and Slowing enemies

 •  Enemies moving within the Caltrops take additional damage and are Slowed again
 •  After casting, your next Mangetsu Attack becomes a ranged attack that deals bonus Physical Damage

A04.name: Piercing Moonlight
A04.description:
Fire 4 piercing beams of moonlight, marking and dealing Physical Damage to enemy gods. You are CC Immune and have Damage Reduction while firing

 •  After firing, dash through all marked gods in order, dealing Physical Damage with each strike, applying Shingetsu & Mangetsu effects, as well as Attack Hit items.
 •  Killing a god with this ability empowers both weapons and grants both ranged attacks

passive.name: Shingetsu & Mangetsu
passive.description:
Damaging enemies empowers your twin tonfas, Shingetsu and Mangetsu.

 •  Empowered Shingetsu cleaves for 50% damage and restores mana
 •  Empowered Mangetsu deals bonus Physical Damage and restores health

allDescriptions.Tsukuyomi.Passive.InGame:
Damaging enemies empowers your twin tonfas, Shingetsu and Mangetsu.

 •  Empowered Shingetsu cleaves for 50% damage and restores mana
 •  Empowered Mangetsu deals bonus Physical Damage and restores health
allDescriptions.Tsukuyomi.Passive.OutOfGame:
Damaging enemies empowers your twin tonfas, Shingetsu and Mangetsu.

 •  Empowered Shingetsu cleaves for 50% damage and restores mana
 •  Empowered Mangetsu deals bonus Physical Damage and restores health

A01.name: Bladed Arrow
A01.description:
Bow: Fire an arrow that passes through enemies and deals Physical Damage to all targets hit. 

Axe: Throw an axe that Stuns and deals Physical Damage to the first enemy it hits.

A02.name: Expose Weakness
A02.description:
Bow: Gain bonus Attack Speed.

Axe: Gain bonus Movement Speed.

A03.name: Hail of Arrows
A03.description:
Bow: Fire a volley, dealing Physical Damage.

 • The arrow remains in the ground for 3s
 • If you activate Wield Axes while the arrow is deployed, the area around it becomes snowy for 3s, Slowing enemies. 

Axe: Leap to deal Physical Damage.

 •  The axes remain in the ground for 3s
 •  If you activate Wield Bow while the axes are deployed, the axes tear open the ground, reducing Physical Protections of enemies hit..

A04.name: Wield Axes
A04.description:
Change stance, remove Disarms, and gain benefits depending on which stance you are in. 

Bow: Ranged Basic Attacks and additional Strength.

Axe: Melee Basic Attacks and additional Lifesteal.

passive.name: Weapon Master
passive.description: When you use an ability in either stance your Cooldowns in the opposite stance are reduced.

allDescriptions.Ullr.PSV.InGame.Short: When you use an ability in either stance your Cooldowns in the opposite stance are reduced.
allDescriptions.Ullr.PSV.OutOfGame: When you use an ability in either stance your Cooldowns in the opposite stance are reduced.

A01.name: Backfire
A01.description:
Fire a projectile that causes you to Dash back and deal Magical Damage to all enemies it hits, marking the first god that is hit.

• Inferno Cannons will prioritize hitting the marked god and deal more damage to them.

A02.name: Inferno Cannon
A02.description:
Create an Inferno Cannon that shoots projectiles every 1s at an enemy in front of it, dealing Magical Damage.

• It lasts until destroyed or another is placed.
• Inherits Vulcan's penetrations in addition to having 25% base Penetration.
• Does not trigger item effects.

A03.name: Magma Bomb
A03.description:
Lob a projectile that explodes on impact with the ground, dealing Magical Damage and Displacing enemies in the area.

• Enemies are displaced up and away from the explosion

A04.name: Earthshaker
A04.description:
Launch a projectile that explodes on impact with the ground, dealing Magical Damage enemies in the area.

• Deals more damage the further it travels.

passive.name: Master Craftsman
passive.description:
Vulcan has access to a variety of Mods in the item shop that affect his abilities. There are 3 sets of mods available at different levels. You can only have one Mod from each set.

Hitting an enemy god with an ability grants you increased Movement Speed and Mana Regen for 5s.

allDescriptions.Vulcan.PSV.InGame.Short:
Vulcan has access to a variety of Mods in the item shop that affect his abilities. There are 3 sets of mods available at different levels. You can only have one Mod from each set.

Hitting an enemy god with an ability grants you increased Movement Speed and Mana Regen for 5s.
allDescriptions.Vulcan.PSV.OutOfGame:
Vulcan has access to a variety of Mods in the item shop that affect his abilities. There are 3 sets of mods available at different levels. You can only have one Mod from each set.

Hitting an enemy god with an ability grants you increased Movement Speed and Mana Regen for 5s.
allDescriptions.Vulcan.PSV.Mod.1.1:
Gain access to the Thumper Turret by alternating between an Inferno Cannon and Thumper each ability activation.
Thumper pulses out an attack around it every 1s that deals 20/30/40/50/60 + 8% INT Magical Damage to all enemies in the area. 
Thumper's Rank will match Inferno Cannon's. Cooldown 6s.

Set 1 - You can only have one Mod from each set.
Can be built at level 1
allDescriptions.Vulcan.PSV.Mod.1.2:
Gain access to the Thumper Turret in your first consumable slot. This will occupy this slot for the entire game. 
Thumper pulses out an attack around it every 1s that deals 20/30/40/50/60 + 8% INT Magical Damage to all enemies in the area. 
Thumper's Rank will match Inferno Cannon's. Cooldown 20s.

Set 1 - You can only have one Mod from each set
Can be built at level 1
allDescriptions.Vulcan.PSV.Mod.1.3:
Do not gain access to the Thumper ability, instead your passive grants 20 CDR and 5 Intelligence + 1 Per Level, in addition to the other effects when triggered. 

Set 1 - You can only have one Mod from each set.
Can be built at level 1
allDescriptions.Vulcan.PSV.Mod.2.1:
Thumper gains 150 increased HP and applies an 10/15/20/25/30% Attack Speed debuff for 3s on hit. 

Set 2 - You can only have one Mod from each set.
Requires level 7.
allDescriptions.Vulcan.PSV.Mod.2.2:
Inferno Cannon applies additional damage over time on hit. Hits 6 times over 3s for 2/4/6/8/10 + 2% INT per hit. 

Set 2 - You can only have one Mod from each set.
Requires level 7.
allDescriptions.Vulcan.PSV.Mod.2.3:
Backfire and Magma Bomb deal 30 + 15% INT Bonus Magical Damage.

Set 2 - You can only have one Mod from each set.
Requires level 7.
allDescriptions.Vulcan.PSV.Mod.3.1:
Thumper gains 300 increased HP and applies a 10/15/20/25/30 Physical and Magical Protection buff to allied gods hit for 3s.

Set 3 - You can only have one Mod from each set.
Requires level 14.
allDescriptions.Vulcan.PSV.Mod.3.2:
You can have 2 Inferno Cannons deployed at the same time. 

Set 3 - You can only have one Mod from each set.
Requires level 14.
allDescriptions.Vulcan.PSV.Mod.3.3:
Earthshaker Knocks Up and Trembles enemies it hits for 2s.

Set 3 - You can only have one Mod from each set.
Requires level 14.
allDescriptions.Vulcan.PSV.InGame.Short.Talent:
Vulcan has access to a variety of Mods in the item shop that affect his abilities. There are 3 sets of mods available at different levels. You can only have one Mod from each set.

Hitting an enemy god with an ability grants you increased Movement Speed and Mana Regen for 5s.

Vulcan and Turrets within 8.8m gain Protections and Health Regen.

A01.name: Branching Bola
A01.description: While active, your Basic Attacks deal additional damage. When the bola hits a target, it splits and deals reduced damage.

A02.name: Poison Darts
A02.description:
Fire 15 dart projectiles in a cone, dealing Physical Damage and poisoning enemies hit.

  • Poisoned enemies repeatedly take Physical Damage and are Slowed.

A03.name: Rising Jaguar
A03.description:
Dash in the direction you are currently traveling before rising in the air, becoming CC Immune.

• While in the air, you fire darts at all nearby enemies, dealing Physical Damage.
• Enemies affected by Poison Darts take additional damage.

A04.name: Darkest of Nights
A04.description:
Shroud enemy gods in darkness, creating an area they cannot see out of. During this time you have increased Basic Attack range, Basic Attack projectile speed, Attack Speed and Movement Speed.

• If an enemy god leaves the area, they are affected by a decaying Slow.

passive.name: Dead of Night
passive.description: Deal damage to enemy gods to gain stacks. Each stack provides Strength or Intelligence, whichever is higher. At 3 and 6 stacks you gain an additional buff of Strength and Intelligence.

allDescriptions.Xbalanque.PSV.OutOfGame: Deal damage to enemy gods to gain stacks. Each stack provides Strength or Intelligence, whichever is higher. At 3 and 6 stacks you gain an additional buff of Strength and Intelligence.
allDescriptions.Xbalanque.PSV.InGame.Short: Deal damage to enemy gods to gain stacks. Each stack provides Strength or Intelligence, whichever is higher. At 3 and 6 stacks you gain an additional buff of Strength and Intelligence.
allDescriptions.Xbalanque.PSV.InGame.Long: Each stack requires more damage dealt to gain the next stack.

A01.name: Bouncing Bubble
A01.description:
Toss a bubble that bounces twice, dealing Magical Damage and Slows enemies before exploding into smaller bubbles.
   • Small bubbles deal reduced Magical Damage

A02.name: Mending Waters
A02.description:
Fire a water wave, dealing Magical Damage to enemies. This wave stops and bounces between allied gods, Healing them and providing them a Health Shield.
  • This ability also does bonus damage to enemy Health Shields.

A03.name: Riptide
A03.description:
Create a water ring that Knock Backs anyone entering it.
  • Allies travel further and gain Movement Speed and Protections for 3s. 
  • Enemies are Slowed for 2s.
  • Placing the ring at the maximum distance reverses it's direction.

A04.name: River's Rebuke
A04.description:
Conjure two large walls of water that block enemy movement and projectiles. After a delay they crash down dealing Magical Damage, Trembling and Slowing enemies hit.
  • Allies impacted by the crashing waves gain Omi Healing and Moonstrike's buff
  • You gain a buff of increased Omi over time on using this ability

passive.name: Omi
passive.description:
Yemoja uses Omi to cast spells instead of Mana.
   • Starting with 7, earning up to 10
Yemoja's water based attacks and abilities can hit allies, providing them a Heal every 0.5s for 6s.

allDescriptions.Yemoja.PSV.InGame.Short:
Yemoja uses Omi to cast spells instead of Mana.
   • Starting with 7, earning up to 10
Yemoja's water based attacks and abilities can hit allies, providing them a Heal for 1 + 0.2 per Level every 0.5s for 6s.
allDescriptions.Yemoja.PSV.InGame.OutOfGame:
Yemoja uses Omi to cast spells instead of Mana.
   • Starting with 7, earning up to 10
Yemoja's water based attacks and abilities can hit allies, providing them a Heal every 0.5s for 6s.
allDescriptions.Yemoja.PSV.InGame.Long: Additional Omi is gained at levels 5, 10 and 15.

A01.name: Ice Wall
A01.description:
Create a Wall that Knocks Back enemies on creation.

  • Reactivate to destroy the Wall early

A02.name: Glacial Strike
A02.description: Smash your club into the ground, creating a field of ice that deals Magical Damage and Slows.

A03.name: Frost Breath
A03.description: Unleash your freezing breath, Stunning enemies in front of you and dealing Magical Damage.

A04.name: Shards Of Ice
A04.description:
Freeze the air around you, Slowing enemies as you Channel.

  • After 3 seconds, erupt with a burst of Magical Damage to all enemies in range
  • You may cancel this ability early, dealing less damage
  • You are CC Immune while using this ability

passive.name: Frostbite
passive.description:
Your abilities apply Frostbite when they damage or CC enemies.

  • Frostbitten enemies take more basic attack damage from you and deal less damage to you
  • Frostbitten enemies also have decreased Attack Speed

allDescriptions.Ymir.PSV.InGame.Long: Frostbite's effect stacks with Critical Strikes.
allDescriptions.Ymir.PSV.InGame.Short:
Your abilities apply Frostbite when they damage or CC enemies.

  • Frostbitten enemies take more basic attack damage [175% STR + 35% INT] from you and deal less damage to you
  • Frostbitten enemies also have decreased Attack Speed
allDescriptions.Ymir.PSV.OutOfGame:
Your abilities apply Frostbite when they damage or CC enemies.

  • Frostbitten enemies take more basic attack damage from you and deal less damage to you
  • Frostbitten enemies also have decreased Attack Speed

A01.name: Chain Lightning
A01.description:
Hurl a bolt of lightning that arcs between enemies.

  • Deals Magical Damage and Slows

A02.name: Thunderclap
A02.description:
Call down lightning, dealing Magical Damage to nearby enemies.

  • You also gain increased Attack Speed, Movement Speed, and Haste for 5s

A03.name: Detonate Charge
A03.description:
Detonate the Charges on all enemies, dealing Magical Damage for each Charge.
 
  • Enemies at Max Charges are Stunned

A04.name: Lightning Storm
A04.description: Conjure a lightning storm that deals Magical Damage repeatedly in an area.

passive.name: Overcharge
passive.description:
Deal damage to apply Charges.

  • Enemies take increased basic attack damage from you for each Charge they have
  • Non-god enemies immediately take 3 stacks.

allDescriptions.Zeus.PSV.InGame.Long: Overcharge's effect stacks with Critical Strikes.
allDescriptions.Zeus.PSV.InGame.Short:
Deal damage to apply Charges.

  • Enemies take increased basic attack damage from you for each Charge they have
  • Non-god enemies immediately take 3 stacks.
